title: Recurrent-Depth VLA: Implicit Test-Time Compute Scaling of Vision-Language-Action Models via Latent Iterative Reasoning
summary: Current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models rely on fixed computational depth, expending the same amount of compute on simple adjustments and complex multi-step manipulation. While Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting enables variable computation, it scales memory linearly and is ill-suited for continuous action spaces. We introduce Recurrent-Depth VLA (RD-VLA), an architecture that achieves computational adaptivity via latent iterative refinement rather than explicit token generation. RD-VLA employs a recurrent, weight-tied action head that supports arbitrary inference depth with a constant memory footprint. The model is trained using truncated backpropagation through time (TBPTT) to efficiently supervise the refinement process. At inference, RD-VLA dynamically allocates compute using an adaptive stopping criterion based on latent convergence. Experiments on challenging manipulation tasks show that recurrent depth is critical: tasks that fail entirely (0 percent success) with single-iteration inference exceed 90 percent success with four iterations, while simpler tasks saturate rapidly. RD-VLA provides a scalable path to test-time compute in robotics, replacing token-based reasoning with latent reasoning to achieve constant memory usage and up to 80x inference speedup over prior reasoning-based VLA models. Project page: https://rd-vla.github.io/
tldr: The paper introduces Recurrent-Depth VLA (RD-VLA), a novel architecture that uses latent iterative refinement and a recurrent action head to achieve adaptive computation in Vision-Language-Action models with constant memory, showing significant performance and speed improvements in robotic manipulation tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了Recurrent-Depth VLA (RD-VLA)，一种新的架构，它使用潜在的迭代细化和一个循环动作头，在视觉-语言-动作模型中实现自适应计算，具有恒定的内存占用，并在机器人操作任务中显示出显著的性能和速度提升。
summary_zh: 当前视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型依赖于固定的计算深度，无论进行简单的调整还是复杂的多步骤操作，都消耗相同的计算量。虽然思维链（CoT）提示能够实现可变的计算，但其内存占用线性增长，且不适用于连续动作空间。我们提出了循环深度VLA（RD-VLA），这是一种通过潜在迭代细化而非显式令牌生成来实现计算自适应性的架构。RD-VLA采用循环、权重共享的动作头，支持任意推理深度，且内存占用恒定。该模型采用截断反向传播时间（TBPTT）进行训练，以高效地监督细化过程。在推理过程中，RD-VLA基于潜在收敛的自适应停止准则，动态地分配计算资源。在具有挑战性的操作任务上的实验表明，循环深度至关重要：在单次迭代推理时完全失败（成功率 0%）的任务，在四次迭代时成功率超过 90%，而较简单的任务则迅速达到饱和。RD-VLA为机器人技术中的测试时计算提供了一种可扩展的途径，它用潜在推理取代基于令牌的推理，实现了恒定的内存使用，并相对于先前的基于推理的VLA模型，实现了高达 80 倍的推理速度提升。项目主页：https://rd-vla.github.io/

title: RLinf-USER: A Unified and Extensible System for Real-World Online Policy Learning in Embodied AI
summary: Online policy learning directly in the physical world is a promising yet challenging direction for embodied intelligence. Unlike simulation, real-world systems cannot be arbitrarily accelerated, cheaply reset, or massively replicated, which makes scalable data collection, heterogeneous deployment, and long-horizon effective training difficult. These challenges suggest that real-world policy learning is not only an algorithmic issue but fundamentally a systems problem. We present USER, a Unified and extensible SystEm for Real-world online policy learning. USER treats physical robots as first-class hardware resources alongside GPUs through a unified hardware abstraction layer, enabling automatic discovery, management, and scheduling of heterogeneous robots. To address cloud-edge communication, USER introduces an adaptive communication plane with tunneling-based networking, distributed data channels for traffic localization, and streaming-multiprocessor-aware weight synchronization to regulate GPU-side overhead. On top of this infrastructure, USER organizes learning as a fully asynchronous framework with a persistent, cache-aware buffer, enabling efficient long-horizon experiments with robust crash recovery and reuse of historical data. In addition, USER provides extensible abstractions for rewards, algorithms, and policies, supporting online imitation or reinforcement learning of CNN/MLP, generative policies, and large vision-language-action (VLA) models within a unified pipeline. Results in both simulation and the real world show that USER enables multi-robot coordination, heterogeneous manipulators, edge-cloud collaboration with large models, and long-running asynchronous training, offering a unified and extensible systems foundation for real-world online policy learning.
tldr: The paper introduces USER, a unified system for real-world online policy learning in embodied AI, addressing challenges in data collection, deployment, and long-horizon training through hardware abstraction, adaptive communication, and asynchronous learning framework. It enables multi-robot coordination, heterogeneous manipulators, and edge-cloud collaboration with large models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为USER的统一系统，用于具身人工智能中的真实世界在线策略学习，通过硬件抽象、自适应通信和异步学习框架，解决数据收集、部署和长周期训练中的挑战。该系统支持多机器人协同、异构操纵器以及基于大型模型的边缘-云协同。
summary_zh: 在线策略学习直接在物理世界中进行，是具身智能领域一个充满希望但也具有挑战性的方向。与仿真环境不同，现实世界系统无法任意加速、低成本重置或大规模复制，这使得可扩展的数据收集、异构部署和长程有效训练变得困难。这些挑战表明，现实世界的策略学习不仅是一个算法问题，更是一个根本上的系统问题。我们提出了USER，一个用于现实世界在线策略学习的统一且可扩展的系统。USER通过统一的硬件抽象层将物理机器人与GPU并列视为一等硬件资源，实现异构机器人的自动发现、管理和调度。为了解决云边通信问题，USER引入了一个自适应通信平面，包含基于隧道的网络连接、用于流量本地化的分布式数据通道以及流式多处理器感知的权重同步，以调节GPU端的开销。在此基础设施之上，USER将学习组织为一个完全异步的框架，具有持久且缓存感知的缓冲区，从而能够进行高效的长程实验，并具有强大的崩溃恢复能力和历史数据重用能力。此外，USER还为奖励、算法和策略提供了可扩展的抽象，支持在线模仿或强化学习 CNN/MLP、生成策略以及大型视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型，并且这些过程都在一个统一的流程中进行。在仿真和真实世界的实验结果表明，USER能够实现多机器人协调、异构机械臂控制、边缘-云协同与大型模型结合以及长时间运行的异步训练，为现实世界的在线策略学习提供了一个统一且可扩展的系统基础。

title: MIND: Benchmarking Memory Consistency and Action Control in World Models
summary: World models aim to understand, remember, and predict dynamic visual environments, yet a unified benchmark for evaluating their fundamental abilities remains lacking. To address this gap, we introduce MIND, the first open-domain closed-loop revisited benchmark for evaluating Memory consIstency and action coNtrol in worlD models. MIND contains 250 high-quality videos at 1080p and 24 FPS, including 100 (first-person) + 100 (third-person) video clips under a shared action space and 25 + 25 clips across varied action spaces covering eight diverse scenes. We design an efficient evaluation framework to measure two core abilities: memory consistency and action control, capturing temporal stability and contextual coherence across viewpoints. Furthermore, we design various action spaces, including different character movement speeds and camera rotation angles, to evaluate the action generalization capability across different action spaces under shared scenes. To facilitate future performance benchmarking on MIND, we introduce MIND-World, a novel interactive Video-to-World baseline. Extensive experiments demonstrate the completeness of MIND and reveal key challenges in current world models, including the difficulty of maintaining long-term memory consistency and generalizing across action spaces. Project page: https://csu-jpg.github.io/MIND.github.io/
tldr: The paper introduces MIND, a new benchmark for evaluating memory consistency and action control in world models, along with a baseline model called MIND-World. The benchmark uses high-quality videos and focuses on temporal stability and contextual coherence.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MIND，一个用于评估世界模型中记忆一致性和动作控制的新基准，以及一个名为MIND-World的基线模型。该基准使用高质量视频，并侧重于时间稳定性和上下文连贯性。
summary_zh: 世界模型旨在理解、记忆和预测动态视觉环境，然而，一个用于评估其基本能力的统一基准仍然缺失。为了弥补这一差距，我们推出了MIND，这是首个开放域、闭环、可复现的基准，用于评估世界模型中的记忆一致性和动作控制。MIND包含250个高质量视频，分辨率为1080p，帧率为24FPS，其中包括100个（第一人称）+ 100个（第三人称）在共享动作空间下的视频片段，以及25 + 25个跨越不同动作空间、涵盖八个不同场景的视频片段。我们设计了一个高效的评估框架来衡量两个核心能力：记忆一致性和动作控制，以捕捉跨视角的时序稳定性和上下文连贯性。此外，我们设计了各种动作空间，包括不同的角色移动速度和相机旋转角度，以评估在共享场景下不同动作空间之间的动作泛化能力。为了方便未来在MIND上的性能基准测试，我们引入了MIND-World，一种新颖的交互式视频到世界的基线方法。大量实验证明了MIND的完备性，并揭示了当前世界模型中的关键挑战，包括维护长期记忆一致性和跨动作空间泛化的难度。项目页面：https://csu-jpg.github.io/MIND.github.io/

title: MARTI-MARS$^2$: Scaling Multi-Agent Self-Search via Reinforcement Learning for Code Generation
summary: While the complex reasoning capability of Large Language Models (LLMs) has attracted significant attention, single-agent systems often encounter inherent performance ceilings in complex tasks such as code generation. Multi-agent collaboration offers a promising avenue to transcend these boundaries. However, existing frameworks typically rely on prompt-based test-time interactions or multi-role configurations trained with homogeneous parameters, limiting error correction capabilities and strategic diversity. In this paper, we propose a Multi-Agent Reinforced Training and Inference Framework with Self-Search Scaling (MARTI-MARS2), which integrates policy learning with multi-agent tree search by formulating the multi-agent collaborative exploration process as a dynamic and learnable environment. By allowing agents to iteratively explore and refine within the environment, the framework facilitates evolution from parameter-sharing homogeneous multi-role training to heterogeneous multi-agent training, breaking through single-agent capability limits. We also introduce an efficient inference strategy MARTI-MARS2-T+ to fully exploit the scaling potential of multi-agent collaboration at test time. We conduct extensive experiments across varied model scales (8B, 14B, and 32B) on challenging code generation benchmarks. Utilizing two collaborating 32B models, MARTI-MARS2 achieves 77.7%, outperforming strong baselines like GPT-5.1. Furthermore, MARTI-MARS2 reveals a novel scaling law: shifting from single-agent to homogeneous multi-role and ultimately to heterogeneous multi-agent paradigms progressively yields higher RL performance ceilings, robust TTS capabilities, and greater policy diversity, suggesting that policy diversity is critical for scaling intelligence via multi-agent reinforcement learning.
tldr: The paper introduces MARTI-MARS$^2$, a multi-agent reinforcement learning framework for code generation that leverages policy learning and tree search to scale performance beyond single-agent limits, achieving state-of-the-art results and revealing a new scaling law related to policy diversity.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 MARTI-MARS$^2$，一个用于代码生成的的多智能体强化学习框架，它利用策略学习和树搜索将性能扩展到超越单智能体的极限，实现了最先进的结果，并揭示了一个与策略多样性相关的新扩展规律。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的复杂推理能力已引起广泛关注，但单智能体系统在代码生成等复杂任务中常常遇到固有的性能瓶颈。多智能体协作为突破这些界限提供了一个有前景的途径。然而，现有的框架通常依赖于基于提示的测试时交互或采用同质参数训练的多角色配置，从而限制了纠错能力和策略多样性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于自搜索扩展的多智能体强化训练与推理框架（MARTI-MARS2），该框架通过将多智能体协同探索过程构建为一个动态且可学习的环境，将策略学习与多智能体树搜索相结合。通过允许智能体在环境中迭代探索和改进，该框架促进了从参数共享的同质多角色训练到异质多智能体训练的演变，从而突破了单智能体的能力限制。我们还引入了一种高效的推理策略MARTI-MARS2-T+，以充分利用测试时多智能体协作的扩展潜力。我们在具有挑战性的代码生成基准上，针对不同的模型规模（8B、14B和32B）进行了广泛的实验。通过利用两个协同的32B模型，MARTI-MARS2实现了77.7%的性能，优于 GPT-5.1等强大的基线模型。此外，MARTI-MARS2揭示了一种新的扩展定律：从单智能体到同质多角色，最终到异质多智能体范式，逐步产生更高的强化学习性能上限、稳健的TTS（文本到语音）能力以及更大的策略多样性，这表明策略多样性对于通过多智能体强化学习扩展智能至关重要。

title: Picasso: Holistic Scene Reconstruction with Physics-Constrained Sampling
summary: In the presence of occlusions and measurement noise, geometrically accurate scene reconstructions -- which fit the sensor data -- can still be physically incorrect. For instance, when estimating the poses and shapes of objects in the scene and importing the resulting estimates into a simulator, small errors might translate to implausible configurations including object interpenetration or unstable equilibrium. This makes it difficult to predict the dynamic behavior of the scene using a digital twin, an important step in simulation-based planning and control of contact-rich behaviors. In this paper, we posit that object pose and shape estimation requires reasoning holistically over the scene (instead of reasoning about each object in isolation), accounting for object interactions and physical plausibility. Towards this goal, our first contribution is Picasso, a physics-constrained reconstruction pipeline that builds multi-object scene reconstructions by considering geometry, non-penetration, and physics. Picasso relies on a fast rejection sampling method that reasons over multi-object interactions, leveraging an inferred object contact graph to guide samples. Second, we propose the Picasso dataset, a collection of 10 contact-rich real-world scenes with ground truth annotations, as well as a metric to quantify physical plausibility, which we open-source as part of our benchmark. Finally, we provide an extensive evaluation of Picasso on our newly introduced dataset and on the YCB-V dataset, and show it largely outperforms the state of the art while providing reconstructions that are both physically plausible and more aligned with human intuition.
tldr: The paper introduces Picasso, a physics-constrained scene reconstruction pipeline that holistically reasons about object pose and shape, addressing the problem of generating physically plausible digital twins for simulation-based planning and control. They also provide a new dataset, Picasso, for benchmarking.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Picasso，一个物理约束的场景重建流程，它整体地推理物体姿势和形状，旨在解决为基于仿真的规划和控制生成物理上合理的数字孪生的难题。他们还提供了一个新的数据集Picasso，用于benchmark。
summary_zh: 在存在遮挡和测量噪声的情况下，几何上精确的场景重建 —— 即拟合传感器数据的重建 —— 仍然可能在物理上不正确。例如，当估计场景中物体的位姿和形状，并将估计结果导入模拟器时，微小的误差可能会转化为不合理的配置，包括物体之间的相互穿透或不稳定的平衡状态。这使得利用数字孪生预测场景的动态行为变得困难，而这正是基于仿真的规划和控制接触密集型行为的重要步骤。在本文中，我们假设物体位姿和形状估计需要对场景进行整体推理（而不是孤立地推理每个物体），同时考虑物体之间的相互作用和物理合理性。为了实现这一目标，我们的第一个贡献是 Picasso，它是一个受物理约束的重建流程，通过考虑几何、非穿透和物理特性来构建多物体场景重建。Picasso 依赖于一种快速拒绝采样方法，该方法对多物体交互进行推理，并利用推断出的物体接触图来指导样本。其次，我们提出了 Picasso 数据集，这是一个包含 10 个接触密集型真实场景的集合，带有真实标签，以及一个量化物理合理性的指标，我们将其作为基准测试的一部分开源。最后，我们对 Picasso 在我们新提出的数据集和 YCB-V 数据集上进行了广泛的评估，结果表明它在很大程度上优于现有技术，同时提供了物理上合理且更符合人类直觉的重建。

title: ForecastOcc: Vision-based Semantic Occupancy Forecasting
summary: Autonomous driving requires forecasting both geometry and semantics over time to effectively reason about future environment states. Existing vision-based occupancy forecasting methods focus on motion-related categories such as static and dynamic objects, while semantic information remains largely absent. Recent semantic occupancy forecasting approaches address this gap but rely on past occupancy predictions obtained from separate networks. This makes current methods sensitive to error accumulation and prevents learning spatio-temporal features directly from images. In this work, we present ForecastOcc, the first framework for vision-based semantic occupancy forecasting that jointly predicts future occupancy states and semantic categories. Our framework yields semantic occupancy forecasts for multiple horizons directly from past camera images, without relying on externally estimated maps. We evaluate ForecastOcc in two complementary settings: multi-view forecasting on the Occ3D-nuScenes dataset and monocular forecasting on SemanticKITTI, where we establish the first benchmark for this task. We introduce the first baselines by adapting two 2D forecasting modules within our framework. Importantly, we propose a novel architecture that incorporates a temporal cross-attention forecasting module, a 2D-to-3D view transformer, a 3D encoder for occupancy prediction, and a semantic occupancy head for voxel-level forecasts across multiple horizons. Extensive experiments on both datasets show that ForecastOcc consistently outperforms baselines, yielding semantically rich, future-aware predictions that capture scene dynamics and semantics critical for autonomous driving.
tldr: The paper introduces ForecastOcc, a novel framework for vision-based semantic occupancy forecasting, jointly predicting future occupancy states and semantic categories from camera images for autonomous driving, outperforming existing methods on Occ3D-nuScenes and SemanticKITTI datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ForecastOcc，一个用于基于视觉的语义占用预测的新框架。它从相机图像中联合预测未来的占用状态和语义类别，用于自动驾驶。在Occ3D-nuScenes和SemanticKITTI数据集上，其性能优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 自主驾驶需要预测时变的几何信息和语义信息，以便有效地推理未来环境状态。现有的基于视觉的占据栅格预测方法侧重于与运动相关的类别，例如静态和动态物体，而语义信息在很大程度上缺失。最近的语义占据栅格预测方法弥补了这一不足，但依赖于从独立网络获得的过去占据栅格预测结果。这使得当前的方法对误差累积敏感，并阻碍了直接从图像中学习时空特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了ForecastOcc，这是第一个基于视觉的语义占据栅格预测框架，它联合预测未来的占据栅格状态和语义类别。我们的框架直接从过去的相机图像中生成多个时间范围的语义占据栅格预测，而无需依赖外部估计的地图。我们分别在两种互补的环境中评估 ForecastOcc：在 Occ3D-nuScenes 数据集上进行多视角预测，以及在 SemanticKITTI 上进行单目预测，并在后者中建立了该任务的第一个基准。我们通过在我们框架内调整两个 2D 预测模块，引入了第一个基线。重要的是，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，该架构包含一个时间交叉注意力预测模块、一个2D到3D的视角转换器、一个用于占据栅格预测的3D编码器以及一个用于跨多个时间范围进行体素级预测的语义占据栅格头。在两个数据集上的大量实验表明，ForecastOcc 一致地优于基线，产生了语义上丰富的、具有未来意识的预测，这些预测捕获了对于自主驾驶至关重要的场景动态和语义。

title: Feasibility-Guided Planning over Multi-Specialized Locomotion Policies
summary: Planning over unstructured terrain presents a significant challenge in the field of legged robotics. Although recent works in reinforcement learning have yielded various locomotion strategies, planning over multiple experts remains a complex issue. Existing approaches encounter several constraints: traditional planners are unable to integrate skill-specific policies, whereas hierarchical learning frameworks often lose interpretability and require retraining whenever new policies are added. In this paper, we propose a feasibility-guided planning framework that successfully incorporates multiple terrain-specific policies. Each policy is paired with a Feasibility-Net, which learned to predict feasibility tensors based on the local elevation maps and task vectors. This integration allows classical planning algorithms to derive optimal paths. Through both simulated and real-world experiments, we demonstrate that our method efficiently generates reliable plans across diverse and challenging terrains, while consistently aligning with the capabilities of the underlying policies.
tldr: This paper introduces a feasibility-guided planning framework for legged robots that integrates multiple terrain-specific locomotion policies using Feasibility-Nets, enabling efficient and reliable path planning over diverse terrains.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种可行性引导的规划框架，用于腿式机器人，它使用可行性网络集成多个特定地形的运动策略，从而能够在各种地形上进行高效可靠的路径规划。
summary_zh: 在非结构化地形上进行规划是足式机器人领域的一个重要挑战。尽管强化学习的最新研究已经产生了各种步态策略，但基于多个专家的规划仍然是一个复杂的问题。现有方法面临几个限制：传统规划器无法整合特定技能的策略，而分层学习框架通常会损失可解释性，并且每当添加新策略时都需要重新训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种可行性引导的规划框架，该框架成功地整合了多个特定于地形的策略。每个策略都与一个可行性网络（Feasibility-Net）配对，该网络学习基于局部高程图和任务向量预测可行性张量。这种整合使得经典规划算法能够推导出最优路径。通过模拟和真实世界的实验，我们证明了我们的方法能够高效地生成在各种具有挑战性的地形上可靠的规划，同时始终与底层策略的能力相符。

title: CoLF: Learning Consistent Leader-Follower Policies for Vision-Language-Guided Multi-Robot Cooperative Transport
summary: In this study, we address vision-language-guided multi-robot cooperative transport, where each robot grounds natural-language instructions from onboard camera observations. A key challenge in this decentralized setting is perceptual misalignment across robots, where viewpoint differences and language ambiguity can yield inconsistent interpretations and degrade cooperative transport. To mitigate this problem, we adopt a dependent leader-follower design, where one robot serves as the leader and the other as the follower. Although such a leader-follower structure appears straightforward, learning with independent and symmetric agents often yields symmetric or unstable behaviors without explicit inductive biases. To address this challenge, we propose Consistent Leader-Follower (CoLF), a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for stable leader-follower role differentiation. CoLF consists of two key components: (1) an asymmetric policy design that induces leader-follower role differentiation, and (2) a mutual-information-based training objective that maximizes a variational lower bound, encouraging the follower to predict the leader's action from its local observation. The leader and follower policies are jointly optimized under the centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) framework to balance task execution and consistent cooperative behaviors. We validate CoLF in both simulation and real-robot experiments using two quadruped robots. The demonstration video is available at https://sites.google.com/view/colf/.
tldr: This paper introduces CoLF, a multi-agent reinforcement learning framework for vision-language-guided multi-robot cooperative transport, which uses an asymmetric policy design and a mutual-information-based training objective to achieve stable leader-follower role differentiation and consistent cooperative behaviors.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为CoLF的多智能体强化学习框架，用于视觉-语言引导的多机器人协同运输。该框架使用非对称策略设计和基于互信息的训练目标，以实现稳定的领导者-跟随者角色区分和一致的协同行为。
summary_zh: 本研究探讨了视觉-语言引导下的多机器人协同运输问题，其中每个机器人通过其车载摄像头观察结果理解自然语言指令。在这种去中心化环境中，一个关键挑战是机器人间的感知错位，视角差异和语言歧义会导致不一致的理解，进而降低协同运输的性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们采用了一种依赖型的领导者-跟随者设计，即一个机器人担任领导者，另一个担任跟随者。虽然这种领导者-跟随者结构看似简单，但在没有显式归纳偏置的情况下，使用独立且对称的智能体进行学习通常会产生对称或不稳定的行为。为了解决这个难题，我们提出了一种名为一致性领导者-跟随者（CoLF）的多智能体强化学习（MARL）框架，用于实现稳定的领导者-跟随者角色区分。CoLF由两个关键组成部分构成：（1）一种非对称策略设计，诱导领导者-跟随者角色区分；（2）一个基于互信息的训练目标，最大化变分下界，鼓励跟随者从其局部观察预测领导者的动作。领导者和跟随者策略在集中式训练和分布式执行（CTDE）框架下联合优化，以平衡任务执行和一致的协同行为。我们在仿真和真实机器人实验中使用两个四足机器人验证了CoLF的有效性。演示视频可在https://sites.google.com/view/colf/找到。

title: Vision and language: Novel Representations and Artificial intelligence for Driving Scene Safety Assessment and Autonomous Vehicle Planning
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently emerged as powerful representation learning systems that align visual observations with natural language concepts, offering new opportunities for semantic reasoning in safety-critical autonomous driving. This paper investigates how vision-language representations support driving scene safety assessment and decision-making when integrated into perception, prediction, and planning pipelines. We study three complementary system-level use cases. First, we introduce a lightweight, category-agnostic hazard screening approach leveraging CLIP-based image-text similarity to produce a low-latency semantic hazard signal. This enables robust detection of diverse and out-of-distribution road hazards without explicit object detection or visual question answering. Second, we examine the integration of scene-level vision-language embeddings into a transformer-based trajectory planning framework using the Waymo Open Dataset. Our results show that naively conditioning planners on global embeddings does not improve trajectory accuracy, highlighting the importance of representation-task alignment and motivating the development of task-informed extraction methods for safety-critical planning. Third, we investigate natural language as an explicit behavioral constraint on motion planning using the doScenes dataset. In this setting, passenger-style instructions grounded in visual scene elements suppress rare but severe planning failures and improve safety-aligned behavior in ambiguous scenarios. Taken together, these findings demonstrate that vision-language representations hold significant promise for autonomous driving safety when used to express semantic risk, intent, and behavioral constraints. Realizing this potential is fundamentally an engineering problem requiring careful system design and structured grounding rather than direct feature injection.
tldr: This paper explores the integration of vision-language models into autonomous driving systems for enhanced safety assessment and planning, demonstrating promising results in hazard detection and constraint-based planning, while highlighting the importance of task-specific representation learning.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了将视觉-语言模型集成到自动驾驶系统中，以增强安全评估和规划。结果表明，该方法在危险检测和基于约束的规划方面具有前景，同时也强调了任务特定表征学习的重要性。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）最近已成为强大的表征学习系统，能够将视觉观察与自然语言概念对齐，为安全攸关的自动驾驶中的语义推理提供新的机会。本文研究了将视觉-语言表征整合到感知、预测和规划流程中时，其如何支持驾驶场景安全评估和决策。我们研究了三个互补的系统级用例。首先，我们引入了一种轻量级的、类别无关的危险筛选方法，利用基于CLIP的图像-文本相似性来产生低延迟的语义危险信号。这使得能够在没有显式目标检测或视觉问答的情况下，稳健地检测各种各样的和超出分布的道路危险。其次，我们研究了使用Waymo开放数据集将场景级视觉-语言嵌入集成到基于Transformer的轨迹规划框架中。我们的结果表明，简单地将规划器条件化于全局嵌入并不能提高轨迹精度，这突显了表征-任务对齐的重要性，并促使我们开发针对安全攸关规划的任务知情提取方法。第三，我们使用doScenes数据集研究了将自然语言作为运动规划的显式行为约束。在这种情况下，以视觉场景元素为基础的乘客式指令能够抑制罕见但严重的规划失败，并在模棱两可的场景中改善符合安全要求的行为。总而言之，这些发现表明，当视觉-语言表征用于表达语义风险、意图和行为约束时，它们对自动驾驶安全具有重大潜力。实现这种潜力本质上是一个工程问题，需要仔细的系统设计和结构化的基础，而不是直接的特征注入。

title: FlashVID: Efficient Video Large Language Models via Training-free Tree-based Spatiotemporal Token Merging
summary: Although Video Large Language Models (VLLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities in video understanding, they are required to process high volumes of visual tokens, causing significant computational inefficiency. Existing VLLMs acceleration frameworks usually compress spatial and temporal redundancy independently, which overlooks the spatiotemporal relationships, thereby leading to suboptimal spatiotemporal compression. The highly correlated visual features are likely to change in spatial position, scale, orientation, and other attributes over time due to the dynamic nature of video. Building on this insight, we introduce FlashVID, a training-free inference acceleration framework for VLLMs. Specifically, FlashVID utilizes Attention and Diversity-based Token Selection (ADTS) to select the most representative tokens for basic video representation, then applies Tree-based Spatiotemporal Token Merging (TSTM) for fine-grained spatiotemporal redundancy elimination. Extensive experiments conducted on three representative VLLMs across five video understanding benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of our method. Notably, by retaining only 10% of visual tokens, FlashVID preserves 99.1% of the performance of LLaVA-OneVision. Consequently, FlashVID can serve as a training-free and plug-and-play module for extending long video frames, which enables a 10x increase in video frame input to Qwen2.5-VL, resulting in a relative improvement of 8.6% within the same computational budget. Code is available at https://github.com/Fanziyang-v/FlashVID.
tldr: FlashVID proposes a training-free framework to accelerate Video Large Language Models by intelligently merging spatiotemporal tokens, achieving significant speedup with minimal performance loss.
tldr_zh: FlashVID 提出了一个免训练的框架，通过智能地合并时空 tokens 来加速视频大型语言模型，实现了显著的加速，同时性能损失极小。
summary_zh: 尽管视频大型语言模型（VLLMs）在视频理解方面展现了卓越的能力，但它们需要处理大量的视觉token，导致显著的计算低效。现有的VLLMs加速框架通常独立地压缩空间和时间冗余，忽略了时空关系，从而导致次优的时空压缩。由于视频的动态特性，高度相关的视觉特征很可能随着时间的推移在空间位置、尺度、方向和其他属性上发生变化。基于这种洞察，我们引入了FlashVID，一种用于VLLMs的免训练推理加速框架。具体来说，FlashVID利用基于注意力和多样性的Token选择（ADTS）来为基本视频表征选择最具代表性的token，然后应用基于树的时空Token合并（TSTM）来进行细粒度的时空冗余消除。在五个视频理解基准上对三个代表性VLLMs进行的广泛实验证明了我们方法的有效性和泛化能力。值得注意的是，通过仅保留10%的视觉token，FlashVID保留了LLaVA-OneVision 99.1%的性能。因此，FlashVID可以作为免训练和即插即用模块来扩展长视频帧，这使得Qwen2.5-VL的视频帧输入增加了10倍，从而在相同的计算预算内实现了8.6%的相对改进。代码可在https://github.com/Fanziyang-v/FlashVID获得。

title: Towards Adaptive, Scalable, and Robust Coordination of LLM Agents: A Dynamic Ad-Hoc Networking Perspective
summary: Multi-agent architectures built on large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated the potential to realize swarm intelligence through well-crafted collaboration. However, the substantial burden of manual orchestration inherently raises an imperative to automate the design of agentic workflows. We frame such an agent coordination challenge as a classic problem in dynamic ad-hoc networking: How to establish adaptive and reliable communication among a scalable number of agentic hosts? In response to this unresolved dilemma, we introduce RAPS, a reputation-aware publish-subscribe paradigm for adaptive, scalable, and robust coordination of LLM agents. RAPS is grounded in the Distributed Publish-Subscribe Protocol, allowing LLM agents to exchange messages based on their declared intents rather than predefined topologies. Beyond this substrate, RAPS further incorporates two coherent overlays: (i) Reactive Subscription, enabling agents to dynamically refine their intents; and (ii) Bayesian Reputation, empowering each agent with a local watchdog to detect and isolate malicious peers. Extensive experiments over five benchmarks showcase that our design effectively reconciles adaptivity, scalability, and robustness in a unified multi-agent coordination framework.
tldr: The paper introduces RAPS, a reputation-aware publish-subscribe paradigm, to automate and improve the coordination of LLM agents in multi-agent systems, addressing adaptivity, scalability, and robustness challenges.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 RAPS，一种具有声誉意识的发布-订阅模式，旨在自动化并改进多智能体系统中 LLM 智能体的协调，解决适应性、可扩展性和鲁棒性挑战。
summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型(LLM)构建的多智能体架构，已展现出通过精心设计的协作实现群体智能的潜力。然而，人工编排的巨大负担迫切需要流程自动化设计。我们将这种智能体协作挑战框定为动态自组织网络中的经典问题：如何在可扩展数量的智能体主机之间建立自适应且可靠的通信？为了应对这一未解决的难题，我们引入了RAPS，一种声誉感知的发布-订阅范式，旨在实现LLM智能体的自适应、可扩展和鲁棒的协作。RAPS基于分布式发布-订阅协议，允许LLM智能体根据其声明的意图而非预定义的拓扑结构交换消息。在此基础上，RAPS进一步集成了两个连贯的叠加层：(i) 反应式订阅，允许智能体动态地调整其意图；以及(ii) 贝叶斯声誉，赋予每个智能体一个本地监视程序，以检测和隔离恶意节点。在五个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的设计有效地统一了多智能体协作框架中的适应性、可扩展性和鲁棒性。

title: LOCA-bench: Benchmarking Language Agents Under Controllable and Extreme Context Growth
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly capable of carrying out long-running, real-world tasks. However, as the amount of context grows, their reliability often deteriorates, a phenomenon known as "context rot". Existing long-context benchmarks primarily focus on single-step settings that evaluate a model's ability to retrieve information from a long snippet. In realistic scenarios, however, LLMs often need to act as agents that explore environments, follow instructions and plans, extract useful information, and predict correct actions under a dynamically growing context. To assess language agents in such settings, we introduce LOCA-bench (a benchmark for LOng-Context Agents). Given a task prompt, LOCA-bench leverages automated and scalable control of environment states to regulate the agent's context length. This design enables LOCA-bench to extend the context length potentially to infinity in a controlled way while keeping the underlying task semantics fixed. LOCA-bench evaluates language agents as a combination of models and scaffolds, including various context management strategies. While agent performance generally degrades as the environment states grow more complex, advanced context management techniques can substantially improve the overall success rate. We open-source LOCA-bench to provide a platform for evaluating models and scaffolds in long-context, agentic scenarios: https://github.com/hkust-nlp/LOCA-bench
tldr: This paper introduces LOCA-bench, a new benchmark for evaluating the performance of language agents in long-context scenarios with controllable and extreme context growth, addressing the 'context rot' problem. The benchmark includes automated environment state control and evaluation of different context management strategies.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LOCA-bench，一个新的基准测试工具，用于评估语言智能体在可控和极端上下文增长的长上下文场景中的性能，解决了"上下文腐烂"问题。该基准测试包括自动环境状态控制和不同上下文管理策略的评估。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）执行长期、真实世界任务的能力日益增强。然而，随着上下文长度的增长，它们的可靠性往往会下降，这种现象被称为“上下文腐烂”。现有的长上下文基准测试主要集中在单步设置上，评估模型从长片段中检索信息的能力。然而，在现实场景中，LLMs通常需要充当智能体，探索环境、遵循指令和计划、提取有用信息，并在动态增长的上下文中预测正确的动作。为了评估这种场景下的语言智能体，我们推出了LOCA-bench（长上下文智能体基准测试）。给定一个任务提示，LOCA-bench利用对环境状态的自动化和可扩展控制来调节智能体的上下文长度。这种设计使得LOCA-bench能够在控制的前提下，将上下文长度潜在地扩展到无限，同时保持底层任务语义不变。LOCA-bench将语言智能体评估为模型和支架的组合，包括各种上下文管理策略。虽然智能体的性能通常会随着环境状态变得更加复杂而下降，但先进的上下文管理技术可以显著提高整体成功率。我们开源了LOCA-bench，以提供一个评估长上下文、智能体场景下的模型和支架的平台：https://github.com/hkust-nlp/LOCA-bench

title: AceGRPO: Adaptive Curriculum Enhanced Group Relative Policy Optimization for Autonomous Machine Learning Engineering
summary: Autonomous Machine Learning Engineering (MLE) requires agents to perform sustained, iterative optimization over long horizons. While recent LLM-based agents show promise, current prompt-based agents for MLE suffer from behavioral stagnation due to frozen parameters. Although Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a remedy, applying it to MLE is hindered by prohibitive execution latency and inefficient data selection. Recognizing these challenges, we propose AceGRPO with two core components: (1) Evolving Data Buffer that continuously repurposes execution traces into reusable training tasks, and (2) Adaptive Sampling guided by a Learnability Potential function, which dynamically prioritizes tasks at the agent's learning frontier to maximize learning efficiency. Leveraging AceGRPO, our trained Ace-30B model achieves a 100% valid submission rate on MLE-Bench-Lite, approaches the performance of proprietary frontier models, and outperforms larger open-source baselines (e.g., DeepSeek-V3.2), demonstrating robust capability for sustained iterative optimization. Code is available at https://github.com/yuzhu-cai/AceGRPO.
tldr: The paper introduces AceGRPO, an RL-based method with an evolving data buffer and adaptive sampling for autonomous MLE, achieving state-of-the-art performance on MLE-Bench-Lite.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AceGRPO，一种基于强化学习的方法，具有演进的数据缓冲区和自适应采样，用于自动机器学习工程，并在MLE-Bench-Lite上实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 自主机器学习工程（MLE）需要智能体在长时间范围内执行持续的、迭代的优化。虽然最近基于LLM的智能体展现出前景，但当前用于MLE的基于提示的智能体由于参数冻结而遭受行为停滞。尽管强化学习（RL）提供了一种补救方法，但将其应用于MLE受到过高的执行延迟和低效的数据选择的阻碍。 认识到这些挑战，我们提出了AceGRPO，它包含两个核心组件：（1）不断将执行轨迹重新用于可重用训练任务的演化数据缓冲区，以及（2）由可学习性势函数引导的自适应采样，该函数动态地优先处理智能体学习前沿的任务，以最大限度地提高学习效率。 利用AceGRPO，我们训练的Ace-30B模型在MLE-Bench-Lite上实现了100%的有效提交率，逼近了专有前沿模型的性能，并且优于更大的开源基线（例如，DeepSeek-V3.2），展示了在持续迭代优化方面的强大能力。 代码可在https://github.com/yuzhu-cai/AceGRPO获取。

title: ToolSelf: Unifying Task Execution and Self-Reconfiguration via Tool-Driven Intrinsic Adaptation
summary: Agentic systems powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable potential in tackling complex, long-horizon tasks. However, their efficacy is fundamentally constrained by static configurations governing agent behaviors, which are fixed prior to execution and fail to adapt to evolving task dynamics. Existing approaches, relying on manual orchestration or heuristic-based patches, often struggle with poor generalization and fragmented optimization. To transcend these limitations, we propose ToolSelf, a novel paradigm enabling tool-driven runtime self-reconfiguration. By abstracting configuration updates as a callable tool, ToolSelf unifies task execution and self-adjustment into a single action space, achieving a phase transition from external rules to intrinsic parameters. Agents can thereby autonomously update their sub-goals and context based on task progression, and correspondingly adapt their strategy and toolbox, transforming from passive executors into dual managers of both task and self. We further devise Configuration-Aware Two-stage Training (CAT), combining rejection sampling fine-tuning with trajectory-level reinforcement learning to internalize this meta-capability. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that ToolSelf rivals specialized workflows while generalizing to novel tasks, achieving a 24.1% average performance gain and illuminating a path toward truly self-adaptive agents.
tldr: The paper introduces ToolSelf, a method allowing LLM-powered agents to unify task execution and self-reconfiguration by treating configuration updates as a callable tool, leading to improved performance and generalization. This approach employs Configuration-Aware Two-stage Training (CAT) to internalize meta-capabilities.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ToolSelf，一种允许LLM驱动的智能体通过将配置更新视为可调用工具来统一任务执行和自我重配置的方法，从而提高性能和泛化能力。这种方法采用配置感知的两阶段训练(CAT)来内化元能力。
summary_zh: 由大型语言模型（LLM）驱动的主体系统已展现出解决复杂、长程任务的卓越潜力。然而，它们的效能从根本上受到静态配置的限制，这些配置在执行前是固定的，无法适应不断演变的任务动态。现有方法依赖于人工编排或基于启发式的补丁，往往面临泛化能力差和碎片化优化的问题。为了超越这些限制，我们提出ToolSelf，一种新颖的范例，能够实现工具驱动的运行时自重配置。通过将配置更新抽象为一个可调用的工具，ToolSelf将任务执行和自我调整统一到一个单一的动作空间中，从而实现了从外部规则到内在参数的相变。主体因此可以根据任务进展自主更新其子目标和上下文，并相应地调整其策略和工具箱，从而从被动执行者转变为任务和自我的双重管理者。我们进一步设计了配置感知两阶段训练（CAT），将拒绝采样微调与轨迹级强化学习结合，以实现这种元能力（meta-capability）的内化。在各种基准测试中进行的大量实验表明，ToolSelf能够与专门的工作流程相媲美，同时泛化到新的任务，平均性能提升24.1%，并为真正自适应主体的实现指明了方向。

title: Direct Soft-Policy Sampling via Langevin Dynamics
summary: Soft policies in reinforcement learning define policies as Boltzmann distributions over state-action value functions, providing a principled mechanism for balancing exploration and exploitation. However, realizing such soft policies in practice remains challenging. Existing approaches either depend on parametric policies with limited expressivity or employ diffusion-based policies whose intractable likelihoods hinder reliable entropy estimation in soft policy objectives. We address this challenge by directly realizing soft-policy sampling via Langevin dynamics driven by the action gradient of the Q-function. This perspective leads to Langevin Q-Learning (LQL), which samples actions from the target Boltzmann distribution without explicitly parameterizing the policy. However, directly applying Langevin dynamics suffers from slow mixing in high-dimensional and non-convex Q-landscapes, limiting its practical effectiveness. To overcome this, we propose Noise-Conditioned Langevin Q-Learning (NC-LQL), which integrates multi-scale noise perturbations into the value function. NC-LQL learns a noise-conditioned Q-function that induces a sequence of progressively smoothed value landscapes, enabling sampling to transition from global exploration to precise mode refinement. On OpenAI Gym MuJoCo benchmarks, NC-LQL achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art diffusion-based methods, providing a simple yet powerful solution for online RL.
tldr: The paper introduces Noise-Conditioned Langevin Q-Learning (NC-LQL), a novel approach for soft policy reinforcement learning that leverages Langevin dynamics and noise-conditioned Q-functions for efficient exploration and exploitation, achieving competitive performance on MuJoCo benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为噪声条件朗之万Q学习（NC-LQL）的新型软策略强化学习方法，该方法利用朗之万动力学和噪声条件Q函数进行高效的探索和利用，并在MuJoCo基准测试中取得了具有竞争力的性能。
summary_zh: 强化学习中的软策略将策略定义为状态-动作值函数上的玻尔兹曼分布，为平衡探索和利用提供了一种原则性的机制。然而，在实践中实现这样的软策略仍然具有挑战性。现有方法要么依赖于表达能力有限的参数化策略，要么采用基于扩散模型的策略，由于其棘手的似然性，阻碍了软策略目标中可靠的熵估计。我们通过直接利用由Q函数的动作梯度驱动的朗之万动力学来实现软策略采样来应对这一挑战。这种视角产生了朗之万Q学习（LQL），它从目标玻尔兹曼分布中采样动作，而无需显式地参数化策略。然而，直接应用朗之万动力学在高维和非凸Q值空间中会遭受缓慢混合的困扰，限制了其在实践中的有效性。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了噪声条件朗之万Q学习（NC-LQL），它将多尺度噪声扰动集成到价值函数中。NC-LQL学习一个噪声条件Q函数，该函数诱导出一系列逐渐平滑的价值空间，使采样能够从全局探索过渡到精确的模式细化。在OpenAI Gym MuJoCo基准测试中，与最先进的基于扩散模型的方法相比，NC-LQL取得了具有竞争力的性能，为在线强化学习提供了一个简单而强大的解决方案。

title: TodoEvolve: Learning to Architect Agent Planning Systems
summary: Planning has become a central capability for contemporary agent systems in navigating complex, long-horizon tasks, yet existing approaches predominantly rely on fixed, hand-crafted planning structures that lack the flexibility to adapt to the structural diversity of open-ended problems. To address this limitation, we introduce TodoEvolve, a meta-planning paradigm that autonomously synthesizes and dynamically revises task-specific planning architectures. Specifically, we first construct PlanFactory, a modular design space that standardizes diverse planning paradigms within a unified codebase encompassing topology, initialization, adaptation, and navigation, thereby providing a common interface for heterogeneous planning patterns. Leveraging PlanFactory, we collect high-quality planning trajectories and train Todo-14B via \textit{Impedance-Guided Preference Optimization} (IGPO), a multi-objective reinforcement learning objective that encourages the generation of planning systems that are performant, stable, and token-efficient across arbitrary tasks and agent backbones. Empirical evaluations on five agentic benchmarks demonstrate that TodoEvolve consistently surpasses carefully engineered planning modules while maintaining economical API costs and runtime overhead.
tldr: The paper introduces TodoEvolve, a meta-planning paradigm that uses reinforcement learning to automatically generate and adapt planning architectures for agents, achieving improved performance and efficiency across benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TodoEvolve，一种元规划范式，它使用强化学习来自动生成和调整代理的规划架构，从而在多个基准测试中实现了更高的性能和效率。
summary_zh: 规划已成为当代智能体系统驾驭复杂、长时程任务的核心能力，然而现有方法主要依赖于固定的、手工设计的规划结构，缺乏适应开放式问题结构多样性的灵活性。为了解决这一局限性，我们引入TodoEvolve，一种元规划范式，能够自主合成并动态修订特定于任务的规划架构。具体而言，我们首先构建PlanFactory，一个模块化设计空间，它在统一的代码库中标准化了各种规划范式，包括拓扑、初始化、适应和导航，从而为异构规划模式提供了一个通用接口。利用PlanFactory，我们收集高质量的规划轨迹，并通过\textit{阻抗引导偏好优化} (IGPO)训练Todo-14B，这是一种多目标强化学习目标，旨在鼓励生成在任意任务和智能体骨干网络中都具有高性能、稳定性和令牌效率的规划系统。在五个智能体基准测试上的经验评估表明，TodoEvolve始终超越精心设计的规划模块，同时保持经济的API成本和运行时开销。

title: VideoTemp-o3: Harmonizing Temporal Grounding and Video Understanding in Agentic Thinking-with-Videos
summary: In long-video understanding, conventional uniform frame sampling often fails to capture key visual evidence, leading to degraded performance and increased hallucinations. To address this, recent agentic thinking-with-videos paradigms have emerged, adopting a localize-clip-answer pipeline in which the model actively identifies relevant video segments, performs dense sampling within those clips, and then produces answers. However, existing methods remain inefficient, suffer from weak localization, and adhere to rigid workflows. To solve these issues, we propose VideoTemp-o3, a unified agentic thinking-with-videos framework that jointly models video grounding and question answering. VideoTemp-o3 exhibits strong localization capability, supports on-demand clipping, and can refine inaccurate localizations. Specifically, in the supervised fine-tuning stage, we design a unified masking mechanism that encourages exploration while preventing noise. For reinforcement learning, we introduce dedicated rewards to mitigate reward hacking. Besides, from the data perspective, we develop an effective pipeline to construct high-quality long video grounded QA data, along with a corresponding benchmark for systematic evaluation across various video durations. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves remarkable performance on both long video understanding and grounding.
tldr: VideoTemp-o3 is a new agentic framework for long video understanding that jointly models video grounding and question answering, demonstrating improved localization and performance through a unified masking mechanism, dedicated RL rewards, and a new high-quality dataset.
tldr_zh: VideoTemp-o3是一个新的用于理解长视频的Agentic框架，它联合建模了视频定位和问答，通过统一的掩码机制、专门的强化学习奖励和一个新的高质量数据集展示了改进的定位和性能。
summary_zh: 在长视频理解中，传统的均匀帧采样常常无法捕捉到关键的视觉证据，导致性能下降和幻觉增多。为了解决这个问题，最近出现了一些基于智能体思维的视频理解范式，采用“定位-剪辑-回答”的流程，其中模型主动识别相关的视频片段，在这些片段内执行密集采样，然后生成答案。然而，现有方法仍然效率低下，存在定位弱和流程僵化的缺点。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了VideoTemp-o3，一个统一的基于智能体思维的视频理解框架，它联合建模视频grounding和问题回答。VideoTemp-o3表现出强大的定位能力，支持按需剪辑，并且可以优化不准确的定位。具体来说，在有监督的微调阶段，我们设计了一种统一的掩码机制，鼓励探索，同时防止噪声干扰。对于强化学习，我们引入了专门的奖励，以缓解奖励利用漏洞问题。此外，从数据的角度来看，我们开发了一个有效的流程来构建高质量的长视频grounded问答数据，以及一个相应的基准用于对各种视频时长进行系统评估。实验结果表明，我们的方法在长视频理解和grounding方面都取得了显著的性能。

title: Do Multi-Agents Dream of Electric Screens? Achieving Perfect Accuracy on AndroidWorld Through Task Decomposition
summary: We present Minitap, a multi-agent system that achieves 100% success on the AndroidWorld benchmark, the first to fully solve all 116 tasks and surpassing human performance (80%). We first analyze why single-agent architectures fail: context pollution from mixed reasoning traces, silent text input failures undetected by the agent, and repetitive action loops without escape. Minitap addresses each failure through targeted mechanisms: cognitive separation across six specialized agents, deterministic post-validation of text input against device state, and meta-cognitive reasoning that detects cycles and triggers strategy changes. Ablations show multi-agent decomposition contributes +21 points over single-agent baselines; verified execution adds +7 points; meta-cognition adds +9 points. We release Minitap as open-source software. https://github.com/minitap-ai/mobile-use
tldr: This paper introduces Minitap, a multi-agent system that achieves 100% accuracy on the AndroidWorld benchmark by addressing common single-agent failures through cognitive separation, deterministic validation, and meta-cognitive reasoning, demonstrating significant improvements over single-agent baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Minitap，一种多智能体系统，通过认知分离、确定性验证和元认知推理来解决常见的单智能体故障，从而在AndroidWorld基准测试中实现了100%的准确率，并展示了相对于单智能体基线的显著改进。
summary_zh: 我们提出了Minitap，一个在AndroidWorld基准测试上实现100%成功率的多智能体系统，是首个完全解决所有116个任务并超越人类表现（80%）的系统。我们首先分析了单智能体架构失败的原因：混合推理轨迹导致的环境污染、智能体无法检测到的静默文本输入失败，以及无法逃脱的重复动作循环。Minitap通过针对性的机制解决了每个失败：六个专业智能体之间的认知分离、针对设备状态的文本输入的确定性后验证，以及检测循环并触发策略改变的元认知推理。消融研究表明，多智能体分解比单智能体基线提高了+21分；验证执行增加了+7分；元认知增加了+9分。我们将Minitap作为开源软件发布。https://github.com/minitap-ai/mobile-use

title: Learning to Continually Learn via Meta-learning Agentic Memory Designs
summary: The statelessness of foundation models bottlenecks agentic systems' ability to continually learn, a core capability for long-horizon reasoning and adaptation. To address this limitation, agentic systems commonly incorporate memory modules to retain and reuse past experience, aiming for continual learning during test time. However, most existing memory designs are human-crafted and fixed, which limits their ability to adapt to the diversity and non-stationarity of real-world tasks. In this paper, we introduce ALMA (Automated meta-Learning of Memory designs for Agentic systems), a framework that meta-learns memory designs to replace hand-engineered memory designs, therefore minimizing human effort and enabling agentic systems to be continual learners across diverse domains. Our approach employs a Meta Agent that searches over memory designs expressed as executable code in an open-ended manner, theoretically allowing the discovery of arbitrary memory designs, including database schemas as well as their retrieval and update mechanisms. Extensive experiments across four sequential decision-making domains demonstrate that the learned memory designs enable more effective and efficient learning from experience than state-of-the-art human-crafted memory designs on all benchmarks. When developed and deployed safely, ALMA represents a step toward self-improving AI systems that learn to be adaptive, continual learners.
tldr: This paper introduces ALMA, a meta-learning framework that automatically designs memory modules for agentic systems, enabling them to continually learn across diverse domains and outperform human-designed memory systems.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为ALMA的元学习框架，该框架可以自动设计代理系统的记忆模块，使其能够在不同的领域中持续学习，并且优于人工设计的记忆系统。
summary_zh: 基础模型无状态的特性限制了智能体系统持续学习的能力，这是进行长时程推理和适应的核心能力。为了解决这一限制，智能体系统通常结合记忆模块来保留和重用过去的经验，旨在实现测试时的持续学习。然而，大多数现有的记忆设计都是人工设计的且固定的，这限制了它们适应现实世界任务的多样性和非平稳性的能力。在本文中，我们引入了ALMA（智能体系统记忆设计的自动化元学习），一个元学习记忆设计的框架，以取代手工设计的记忆设计，从而最大限度地减少人工干预，并使智能体系统能够在不同的领域中成为持续学习者。我们的方法采用了一个元智能体，以开放的方式搜索表示为可执行代码的记忆设计，理论上允许发现任意的记忆设计，包括数据库模式以及它们的检索和更新机制。跨越四个序贯决策领域的广泛实验表明，与最先进的人工设计的记忆设计相比，学习到的记忆设计在所有基准测试中都能实现更有效和高效的经验学习。当安全地开发和部署时，ALMA代表着朝着可自我改进的AI系统迈出的一步，这些系统将学会适应和持续学习。

title: Do We Need Adam? Surprisingly Strong and Sparse Reinforcement Learning with SGD in LLMs
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL), particularly RL from verifiable reward (RLVR), has become a crucial phase of training large language models (LLMs) and a key focus of current scaling efforts. However, optimization practices in RL largely follow those of next-token prediction stages (e.g., pretraining and supervised fine-tuning), despite fundamental differences between RL and these stages highlighted by recent work. One such practice is the use of the AdamW optimizer, which is widely adopted for training large-scale transformers despite its high memory overhead. Our analysis shows that both momentum and adaptive learning rates in AdamW are less influential in RL than in SFT, leading us to hypothesize that RL benefits less from Adam-style per-parameter adaptive learning rates and momentum. Confirming this hypothesis, our experiments demonstrate that the substantially more memory-efficient SGD, which is known to perform poorly in supervised learning of large-scale transformers, matches or even outperforms AdamW in RL for LLMs. Remarkably, full fine-tuning with SGD updates fewer than 0.02% of model parameters without any sparsity-promoting regularization, more than 1000 times fewer than AdamW. Our analysis offers potential reasons for this update sparsity. These findings provide new insights into the optimization dynamics of RL in LLMs and show that RL can be substantially more parameter-efficient than previously recognized.
tldr: The paper shows that SGD, a memory-efficient optimizer, performs comparably or better than AdamW in RL for LLMs, achieving surprisingly high sparsity in parameter updates.
tldr_zh: 该论文表明，在大型语言模型的强化学习中，一种内存高效的优化器SGD的性能与AdamW相当甚至更好，并且在参数更新中实现了出人意料的高稀疏性。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL），特别是来自可验证回报的强化学习（RLVR），已经成为训练大型语言模型（LLMs）的关键阶段和当前扩展工作的重点。然而，强化学习中的优化实践在很大程度上沿用了下一词元预测阶段（例如，预训练和监督微调）的做法，尽管近期研究强调了强化学习与这些阶段之间存在根本差异。其中一个实践是使用AdamW优化器，尽管其内存开销很高，但已被广泛应用于训练大规模Transformer。我们的分析表明，AdamW中的动量和自适应学习率在强化学习中的影响不如在监督微调中那么大，这促使我们假设强化学习从Adam风格的逐参数自适应学习率和动量中获益较少。为了验证这个假设，我们的实验表明，在大型语言模型的强化学习中，内存效率高得多且已知在大型Transformer的监督学习中表现不佳的SGD可以与AdamW相媲美，甚至超越AdamW。值得注意的是，使用SGD进行全参数微调仅更新不到0.02%的模型参数，且没有任何促进稀疏性的正则化，比AdamW少1000多倍。我们的分析为这种更新稀疏性提供了潜在的原因。这些发现为大型语言模型中强化学习的优化动态提供了新的见解，并表明强化学习可以比以前认为的更具参数效率。

title: Process-of-Thought Reasoning for Videos
summary: Video understanding requires not only recognizing visual content but also performing temporally grounded, multi-step reasoning over long and noisy observations. We propose Process-of-Thought (PoT) Reasoning for Videos, a framework that makes the reasoning process explicit by structuring video inference into a sequence of lightweight, verifiable steps. PoT interleaves (i) temporal evidence selection, (ii) step-wise state updates, and (iii) constrained answer synthesis, enabling the model to progressively refine hypotheses while maintaining traceability to video evidence. The framework is designed to be model-agnostic and can be plugged into existing vision-language backbones, supporting both closed-book reasoning and evidence-augmented reasoning with external tools. We further introduce a unified representation for PoT traces that aligns intermediate decisions with temporal segments, which improves robustness to distractors and reduces hallucinated explanations. Extensive experiments on standard video reasoning tasks demonstrate that PoT consistently improves factual correctness and temporal grounding, while providing interpretable reasoning traces for diagnosis and downstream use.
tldr: The paper introduces Process-of-Thought (PoT) Reasoning for Videos, a framework that structures video inference into verifiable steps improving factual correctness, temporal grounding, and interpretability by interleaving temporal evidence selection, step-wise state updates, and constrained answer synthesis.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了用于视频的Process-of-Thought（PoT）推理框架，它将视频推理构建为可验证的步骤，通过交错时序证据选择、逐步状态更新和约束答案合成，提高事实正确性、时间定位和可解释性。
summary_zh: 视频理解不仅需要识别视觉内容，还需要对长期且带有噪声的观察结果执行时间对齐的、多步骤推理。我们提出了针对视频的思维过程（PoT）推理，该框架通过将视频推理结构化为一系列轻量级、可验证的步骤，使推理过程显式化。PoT交错执行（i）时间证据选择、（ii）逐步状态更新和（iii）约束答案合成，使模型能够在保持对视频证据可追溯性的同时，逐步细化假设。该框架被设计为模型无关的，并且可以嵌入到现有的视觉-语言骨干网络中，支持封闭式推理和利用外部工具进行证据增强推理。我们进一步引入了一种统一的PoT追踪表示，使中间决策与时间片段对齐，从而提高对干扰因素的鲁棒性并减少幻觉解释。在标准视频推理任务上的大量实验表明，PoT始终能提高事实正确性和时间对齐性，同时提供可解释的推理追踪，以供诊断和下游使用。

title: Debugging code world models
summary: Code World Models (CWMs) are language models trained to simulate program execution by predicting explicit runtime state after every executed command. This execution-based world modeling enables internal verification within the model, offering an alternative to natural language chain-of-thought reasoning. However, the sources of errors and the nature of CWMs' limitations remain poorly understood. We study CWMs from two complementary perspectives: local semantic execution and long-horizon state tracking. On real-code benchmarks, we identify two dominant failure regimes. First, dense runtime state reveals produce token-intensive execution traces, leading to token-budget exhaustion on programs with long execution histories. Second, failures disproportionately concentrate in string-valued state, which we attribute to limitations of subword tokenization rather than program structure. To study long-horizon behavior, we use a controlled permutation-tracking benchmark that isolates state propagation under action execution. We show that long-horizon degradation is driven primarily by incorrect action generation: when actions are replaced with ground-truth commands, a Transformer-based CWM propagates state accurately over long horizons, despite known limitations of Transformers in long-horizon state tracking. These findings suggest directions for more efficient supervision and state representations in CWMs that are better aligned with program execution and data types.
tldr: This paper analyzes failure modes in Code World Models (CWMs), identifying token-budget exhaustion and string-valued state errors as primary issues, and suggesting improvements for more efficient supervision and state representation.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了代码世界模型（CWMs）中的失败模式，确定了令牌预算耗尽和字符串值状态错误为主要问题，并提出了改进的监督和状态表示以提高效率。
summary_zh: 代码世界模型（CWMs）是一种语言模型，通过预测每条执行命令后的显式运行时状态来模拟程序执行。这种基于执行的世界建模使得模型内部能够进行验证，为自然语言思维链推理提供了一种替代方案。然而，CWMs的错误来源和局限性本质仍然知之甚少。我们从两个互补的角度研究了CWMs：局部语义执行和长时程状态追踪。在真实代码基准测试中，我们确定了两种主要的失效模式。首先，密集的运行时状态会产生大量token的执行轨迹，导致在具有较长执行历史的程序上出现token预算耗尽的情况。其次，失败不成比例地集中在字符串值状态中，我们将其归因于子词标记化的局限性，而非程序结构。为了研究长时程行为，我们使用一个受控的置换跟踪基准测试，该基准测试隔离了动作执行下的状态传播。我们表明，长时程衰退主要由不正确的动作生成驱动：当动作被替换为真实命令时，基于Transformer的CWM能够准确地在长时程上传播状态，尽管Transformer在长时程状态追踪方面存在已知的局限性。这些发现为CWMs中更有效的监督和状态表示提供了方向，这些方向与程序执行和数据类型更好地对齐。

title: Agent-Fence: Mapping Security Vulnerabilities Across Deep Research Agents
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as *deep agents* that plan, maintain persistent state, and invoke external tools, shifting safety failures from unsafe text to unsafe *trajectories*. We introduce **AgentFence**, an architecture-centric security evaluation that defines 14 trust-boundary attack classes spanning planning, memory, retrieval, tool use, and delegation, and detects failures via *trace-auditable conversation breaks* (unauthorized or unsafe tool use, wrong-principal actions, state/objective integrity violations, and attack-linked deviations). Holding the base model fixed, we evaluate eight agent archetypes under persistent multi-turn interaction and observe substantial architectural variation in mean security break rate (MSBR), ranging from $0.29 \pm 0.04$ (LangGraph) to $0.51 \pm 0.07$ (AutoGPT). The highest-risk classes are operational: Denial-of-Wallet ($0.62 \pm 0.08$), Authorization Confusion ($0.54 \pm 0.10$), Retrieval Poisoning ($0.47 \pm 0.09$), and Planning Manipulation ($0.44 \pm 0.11$), while prompt-centric classes remain below $0.20$ under standard settings. Breaks are dominated by boundary violations (SIV 31%, WPA 27%, UTI+UTA 24%, ATD 18%), and authorization confusion correlates with objective and tool hijacking ($ρ\approx 0.63$ and $ρ\approx 0.58$). AgentFence reframes agent security around what matters operationally: whether an agent stays within its goal and authority envelope over time.
tldr: The paper introduces AgentFence, a framework to evaluate security vulnerabilities in LLM-based deep agents by identifying architectural weaknesses and attack trajectories related to planning, memory, and tool use. It reveals significant architectural variations in security and highlights high-risk operational attack classes.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AgentFence，一个用于评估基于LLM的深度代理中安全漏洞的框架，通过识别与规划、内存和工具使用相关的架构弱点和攻击轨迹。它揭示了安全性的显著架构差异，并突出了高风险的操作攻击类别。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型越来越多地被部署为能够进行规划、维护持久状态和调用外部工具的*深度代理*，这使得安全故障从不安全的文本转移到不安全的*轨迹*。我们引入了 **AgentFence**，一种以架构为中心的安全评估方法，它定义了14个跨越规划、记忆、检索、工具使用和委派的信任边界攻击类别，并通过*可追踪审计的对话中断*（未经授权或不安全的工具使用、错误的代理操作、状态/目标完整性违规以及与攻击相关的偏差）来检测故障。在保持基础模型不变的情况下，我们评估了八种代理原型在持久多轮交互下的表现，并观察到平均安全中断率 (MSBR) 存在显著的架构差异，范围从 $0.29 \pm 0.04$ (LangGraph) 到 $0.51 \pm 0.07$ (AutoGPT)。风险最高的类别是操作相关的：钱包拒绝服务 ($0.62 \pm 0.08$)、授权混淆 ($0.54 \pm 0.10$)、检索投毒 ($0.47 \pm 0.09$) 和规划操纵 ($0.44 \pm 0.11$)，而以提示为中心的类别在标准设置下仍然低于 $0.20$。中断主要由边界违规主导（SIV 31%，WPA 27%，UTI+UTA 24%，ATD 18%），并且授权混淆与目标和工具劫持相关（$ρ\approx 0.63$ 和 $ρ\approx 0.58$）。AgentFence 将代理安全围绕操作层面的关键要素重新定义：即代理是否能在一段时间内保持在其目标和权限范围内。

title: Geometry-Aware Rotary Position Embedding for Consistent Video World Model
summary: Predictive world models that simulate future observations under explicit camera control are fundamental to interactive AI. Despite rapid advances, current systems lack spatial persistence: they fail to maintain stable scene structures over long trajectories, frequently hallucinating details when cameras revisit previously observed locations. We identify that this geometric drift stems from reliance on screen-space positional embeddings, which conflict with the projective geometry required for 3D consistency. We introduce \textbf{ViewRope}, a geometry-aware encoding that injects camera-ray directions directly into video transformer self-attention layers. By parameterizing attention with relative ray geometry rather than pixel locality, ViewRope provides a model-native inductive bias for retrieving 3D-consistent content across temporal gaps. We further propose \textbf{Geometry-Aware Frame-Sparse Attention}, which exploits these geometric cues to selectively attend to relevant historical frames, improving efficiency without sacrificing memory consistency. We also present \textbf{ViewBench}, a diagnostic suite measuring loop-closure fidelity and geometric drift. Our results demonstrate that ViewRope substantially improves long-term consistency while reducing computational costs.
tldr: The paper introduces ViewRope, a geometry-aware rotary position embedding for video transformers, improving long-term consistency and reducing computational costs in video world models by encoding camera-ray directions directly into self-attention layers.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ViewRope，一种几何感知的旋转位置嵌入，通过将相机射线方向直接编码到自注意力层中，从而提高视频Transformer的长期一致性并降低视频世界模型的计算成本。
summary_zh: 预测世界模型通过显式相机控制来模拟未来观测，对于交互式人工智能至关重要。尽管取得了快速进展，但当前的系统缺乏空间持久性：它们无法在长轨迹上保持稳定的场景结构，并且在相机重新访问先前观察到的位置时，经常产生细节幻觉。我们确定这种几何漂移源于对屏幕空间位置嵌入的依赖，这与3D一致性所需的投影几何相冲突。我们引入了 \textbf{ViewRope}，一种几何感知编码，它将相机光线方向直接注入视频Transformer自注意力层中。通过使用相对光线几何而不是像素局部性来参数化注意力，ViewRope提供了一种模型原生的归纳偏置，用于跨时间间隙检索3D一致的内容。我们进一步提出 \textbf{几何感知帧稀疏注意力}，它利用这些几何线索来选择性地关注相关的历史帧，从而在不牺牲内存一致性的情况下提高效率。我们还提出了 \textbf{ViewBench}，一个用于测量回环闭合保真度和几何漂移的诊断套件。我们的结果表明，ViewRope 在显著提高长期一致性的同时，降低了计算成本。

title: Open-Text Aerial Detection: A Unified Framework For Aerial Visual Grounding And Detection
summary: Open-Vocabulary Aerial Detection (OVAD) and Remote Sensing Visual Grounding (RSVG) have emerged as two key paradigms for aerial scene understanding. However, each paradigm suffers from inherent limitations when operating in isolation: OVAD is restricted to coarse category-level semantics, while RSVG is structurally limited to single-target localization. These limitations prevent existing methods from simultaneously supporting rich semantic understanding and multi-target detection. To address this, we propose OTA-Det, the first unified framework that bridges both paradigms into a cohesive architecture. Specifically, we introduce a task reformulation strategy that unifies task objectives and supervision mechanisms, enabling joint training across datasets from both paradigms with dense supervision signals. Furthermore, we propose a dense semantic alignment strategy that establishes explicit correspondence at multiple granularities, from holistic expressions to individual attributes, enabling fine-grained semantic understanding. To ensure real-time efficiency, OTA-Det builds upon the RT-DETR architecture, extending it from closed-set detection to open-text detection by introducing several high efficient modules, achieving state-of-the-art performance on six benchmarks spanning both OVAD and RSVG tasks while maintaining real-time inference at 34 FPS.
tldr: The paper introduces OTA-Det, a unified framework for Open-Vocabulary Aerial Detection (OVAD) and Remote Sensing Visual Grounding (RSVG), achieving state-of-the-art performance and real-time efficiency by bridging both paradigms and using dense semantic alignment.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OTA-Det，一个统一的开放词汇空中检测（OVAD）和遥感视觉定位（RSVG）框架，通过桥接两种范式并使用密集语义对齐，实现了最先进的性能和实时效率。
summary_zh: 开放词汇空中检测 (OVAD) 和遥感视觉定位 (RSVG) 已成为空中场景理解的两个关键范式。然而，每种范式在独立运行时都存在固有的局限性：OVAD 受限于粗粒度的类别级别语义，而 RSVG 在结构上仅限于单目标定位。这些局限性阻止了现有方法同时支持丰富的语义理解和多目标检测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 OTA-Det，这是第一个将这两种范式桥接到一个统一架构中的统一框架。具体来说，我们引入了一种任务重构策略，该策略统一了任务目标和监督机制，从而可以通过来自两种范式的数据集进行联合训练，并具有密集的监督信号。此外，我们提出了一种密集语义对齐策略，该策略在多个粒度级别上建立显式对应关系，从整体表达方式到个体属性，从而实现细粒度的语义理解。为了确保实时效率，OTA-Det 基于 RT-DETR 架构构建，通过引入几个高效模块将其从封闭集检测扩展到开放文本检测，在涵盖 OVAD 和 RSVG 任务的六个基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，同时保持了 34 FPS 的实时推理速度。

title: Horizon Imagination: Efficient On-Policy Training in Diffusion World Models
summary: We study diffusion-based world models for reinforcement learning, which offer high generative fidelity but face critical efficiency challenges in control. Current methods either require heavyweight models at inference or rely on highly sequential imagination, both of which impose prohibitive computational costs. We propose Horizon Imagination (HI), an on-policy imagination process for discrete stochastic policies that denoises multiple future observations in parallel. HI incorporates a stabilization mechanism and a novel sampling schedule that decouples the denoising budget from the effective horizon over which denoising is applied while also supporting sub-frame budgets. Experiments on Atari 100K and Craftium show that our approach maintains control performance with a sub-frame budget of half the denoising steps and achieves superior generation quality under varied schedules. Code is available at https://github.com/leor-c/horizon-imagination.
tldr: The paper introduces Horizon Imagination (HI), a new on-policy imagination process for diffusion-based world models that improves training efficiency by parallel denoising and decoupling the denoising budget from the effective horizon, demonstrating promising results on Atari 100K and Craftium.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Horizon Imagination (HI)，一种新的基于扩散的世界模型的在线想象过程，通过并行去噪和将去噪预算与有效horizon解耦来提高训练效率，并在Atari 100K和Craftium上展示了有希望的结果。
summary_zh: 我们研究了基于扩散的世界模型在强化学习中的应用，该模型具有很高的生成保真度，但在控制方面面临着严峻的效率挑战。目前的方法要么需要在推理阶段使用重量级模型，要么依赖于高度串行的想象过程，这两种方法都带来了极高的计算成本。我们提出了一种名为Horizon Imagination (HI) 的 on-policy 想象过程，用于离散随机策略，它可以并行去噪多个未来观测。HI 结合了一种稳定机制和一种新颖的采样调度策略，该策略将去噪预算与应用去噪的有效时间范围解耦，同时还支持亚帧（sub-frame）预算。在 Atari 100K 和 Craftium 上的实验表明，我们的方法在去噪步数的一半的亚帧预算下保持了控制性能，并在各种调度策略下实现了卓越的生成质量。代码可在 https://github.com/leor-c/horizon-imagination 获取。

title: Integrating Specialized and Generic Agent Motion Prediction with Dynamic Occupancy Grid Maps
summary: Accurate prediction of driving scene is a challenging task due to uncertainty in sensor data, the complex behaviors of agents, and the possibility of multiple feasible futures. Existing prediction methods using occupancy grid maps primarily focus on agent-agnostic scene predictions, while agent-specific predictions provide specialized behavior insights with the help of semantic information. However, both paradigms face distinct limitations: agent-agnostic models struggle to capture the behavioral complexities of dynamic actors, whereas agent-specific approaches fail to generalize to poorly perceived or unrecognized agents; combining both enables robust and safer motion forecasting. To address this, we propose a unified framework by leveraging Dynamic Occupancy Grid Maps within a streamlined temporal decoding pipeline to simultaneously predict future occupancy state grids, vehicle grids, and scene flow grids. Relying on a lightweight spatiotemporal backbone, our approach is centered on a tailored, interdependent loss function that captures inter-grid dependencies and enables diverse future predictions. By using occupancy state information to enforce flow-guided transitions, the loss function acts as a regularizer that directs occupancy evolution while accounting for obstacles and occlusions. Consequently, the model not only predicts the specific behaviors of vehicle agents, but also identifies other dynamic entities and anticipates their evolution within the complex scene. Evaluations on real-world nuScenes and Woven Planet datasets demonstrate superior prediction performances for dynamic vehicles and generic dynamic scene elements compared to baseline methods.
tldr: This paper proposes a unified framework using Dynamic Occupancy Grid Maps to simultaneously predict future occupancy state grids, vehicle grids, and scene flow grids for improved motion forecasting of both vehicles and other dynamic scene elements.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种统一框架，使用动态占据网格地图同时预测未来占据状态网格、车辆网格和场景流网格，以提高车辆和其他动态场景元素的运动预测能力。
summary_zh: 精确预测驾驶场景是一项具有挑战性的任务，原因在于传感器数据的不确定性、智能体的复杂行为以及多种可行未来的可能性。现有的使用占据栅格地图的预测方法主要集中于与智能体无关的场景预测，而与智能体相关的预测则借助语义信息提供专门的行为洞察。然而，这两种范式都面临着各自的局限性：与智能体无关的模型难以捕捉动态行为体的行为复杂性，而与智能体相关的方法则难以泛化到感知不良或未识别的智能体；将两者结合可以实现更稳健、更安全的运动预测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种统一的框架，该框架利用动态占据栅格地图，在一个精简的时间解码流程中，同时预测未来的占据状态栅格、车辆栅格和场景流栅格。我们的方法依赖于轻量级的时空骨干网络，并以定制的、相互依赖的损失函数为中心，该损失函数捕捉栅格间的依赖性并实现多样的未来预测。通过使用占据状态信息来强制执行流引导的转换，该损失函数作为一个正则化器，指导占据演变，同时考虑障碍物和遮挡。因此，该模型不仅预测车辆智能体的特定行为，还能识别其他动态实体并预测它们在复杂场景中的演变。在真实世界的 nuScenes 和 Woven Planet 数据集上的评估表明，与基线方法相比，该方法在动态车辆和通用动态场景元素的预测性能方面表现优异。

title: Epigraph-Guided Flow Matching for Safe and Performant Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) provides a compelling paradigm for training autonomous systems without the risks of online exploration, particularly in safety-critical domains. However, jointly achieving strong safety and performance from fixed datasets remains challenging. Existing safe offline RL methods often rely on soft constraints that allow violations, introduce excessive conservatism, or struggle to balance safety, reward optimization, and adherence to the data distribution. To address this, we propose Epigraph-Guided Flow Matching (EpiFlow), a framework that formulates safe offline RL as a state-constrained optimal control problem to co-optimize safety and performance. We learn a feasibility value function derived from an epigraph reformulation of the optimal control problem, thereby avoiding the decoupled objectives or post-hoc filtering common in prior work. Policies are synthesized by reweighting the behavior distribution based on this epigraph value function and fitting a generative policy via flow matching, enabling efficient, distribution-consistent sampling. Across various safety-critical tasks, including Safety-Gymnasium benchmarks, EpiFlow achieves competitive returns with near-zero empirical safety violations, demonstrating the effectiveness of epigraph-guided policy synthesis.
tldr: The paper introduces Epigraph-Guided Flow Matching (EpiFlow), a safe offline RL framework that uses an epigraph reformulation of optimal control to co-optimize safety and performance, achieving near-zero safety violations and competitive returns on safety-critical tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Epigraph引导的流匹配（EpiFlow），这是一种安全的离线强化学习框架，它使用最优控制的epigraph重构来共同优化安全性和性能，在安全关键任务上实现接近于零的安全违规和具有竞争力的回报。
summary_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）为训练自主系统提供了一个引人注目的范例，避免了在线探索的风险，尤其是在安全攸关领域。然而，从固定数据集上同时实现强大的安全性和性能仍然具有挑战性。现有的安全离线RL方法通常依赖于允许违规的软约束、引入过度的保守性，或者难以平衡安全性、奖励优化和对数据分布的遵守。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种图上引导流匹配（EpiFlow）框架，该框架将安全离线RL形式化为一个状态约束的最优控制问题，以协同优化安全性和性能。我们学习一个可行性价值函数，该函数来源于最优控制问题的图上重构，从而避免了先前工作中常见的解耦目标或事后过滤。通过基于该图上价值函数重新加权行为分布，并利用流匹配拟合生成策略来合成策略，从而实现高效且分布一致的采样。在包括Safety-Gymnasium基准在内的各种安全攸关任务中，EpiFlow实现了具有竞争力的回报，同时几乎没有经验安全违规，证明了图上引导策略合成的有效性。

title: Implicit Strategic Optimization: Rethinking Long-Horizon Decision-Making in Adversarial Poker Environments
summary: Training large language model (LLM) agents for adversarial games is often driven by episodic objectives such as win rate. In long-horizon settings, however, payoffs are shaped by latent strategic externalities that evolve over time, so myopic optimization and variation-based regret analyses can become vacuous even when the dynamics are predictable. To solve this problem, we introduce Implicit Strategic Optimization (ISO), a prediction-aware framework in which each agent forecasts the current strategic context and uses it to update its policy online. ISO combines a Strategic Reward Model (SRM) that estimates the long-run strategic value of actions with iso-grpo, a context-conditioned optimistic learning rule. We prove sublinear contextual regret and equilibrium convergence guarantees whose dominant terms scale with the number of context mispredictions; when prediction errors are bounded, our bounds recover the static-game rates obtained when strategic externalities are known. Experiments in 6-player No-Limit Texas Hold'em and competitive Pokemon show consistent improvements in long-term return over strong LLM and RL baselines, and graceful degradation under controlled prediction noise.
tldr: The paper introduces Implicit Strategic Optimization (ISO), a prediction-aware framework for training LLM agents in long-horizon adversarial games like Poker and Pokemon, showing improved long-term returns over baselines by forecasting and adapting to the strategic context.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了隐式策略优化 (ISO)，一种预测感知的框架，用于在扑克和宝可梦等长期对抗性游戏中训练 LLM 代理，通过预测并适应策略环境，在基线上显示出更高的长期回报。
summary_zh: 训练大型语言模型（LLM）智能体参与对抗博弈通常由诸如胜率之类的分幕式目标驱动。然而，在长时域环境中，收益受到随时间演变的潜在战略外部性的影响，因此，即使动态是可预测的，短视的优化和基于变分的后悔分析也可能变得空洞无意义。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了隐式战略优化（ISO），这是一个预测感知的框架，其中每个智能体预测当前的战略上下文，并使用它来在线更新其策略。 ISO结合了一个战略奖励模型（SRM），该模型估计行动的长期战略价值，以及iso-grpo，一种上下文条件乐观学习规则。我们证明了次线性的上下文后悔和均衡收敛保证，其主导项与上下文误预测的数量成比例；当预测误差有界时，我们的界限恢复了战略外部性已知时获得的静态博弈速率。在6人无限注德州扑克和竞争性宝可梦中的实验表明，与强大的LLM和强化学习基线相比，长期收益持续改进，并且在受控的预测噪声下表现出优雅的性能退化。

title: FIRE: Frobenius-Isometry Reinitialization for Balancing the Stability-Plasticity Tradeoff
summary: Deep neural networks trained on nonstationary data must balance stability (i.e., retaining prior knowledge) and plasticity (i.e., adapting to new tasks). Standard reinitialization methods, which reinitialize weights toward their original values, are widely used but difficult to tune: conservative reinitializations fail to restore plasticity, while aggressive ones erase useful knowledge. We propose FIRE, a principled reinitialization method that explicitly balances the stability-plasticity tradeoff. FIRE quantifies stability through Squared Frobenius Error (SFE), measuring proximity to past weights, and plasticity through Deviation from Isometry (DfI), reflecting weight isotropy. The reinitialization point is obtained by solving a constrained optimization problem, minimizing SFE subject to DfI being zero, which is efficiently approximated by Newton-Schulz iteration. FIRE is evaluated on continual visual learning (CIFAR-10 with ResNet-18), language modeling (OpenWebText with GPT-0.1B), and reinforcement learning (HumanoidBench with SAC and Atari games with DQN). Across all domains, FIRE consistently outperforms both naive training without intervention and standard reinitialization methods, demonstrating effective balancing of the stability-plasticity tradeoff.
tldr: The paper introduces FIRE, a novel reinitialization method for deep neural networks that balances stability and plasticity by minimizing Squared Frobenius Error (SFE) while maintaining Deviation from Isometry (DfI). It shows improved performance across continual learning, language modeling, and reinforcement learning tasks compared to standard reinitialization techniques.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为FIRE的全新深度神经网络重初始化方法，通过最小化平方Frobenius误差（SFE）并保持与等距的偏差（DfI）来平衡稳定性和可塑性。实验表明，与标准的重初始化技术相比，FIRE在持续学习、语言建模和强化学习任务中表现更佳。
summary_zh: 在非平稳数据上训练的深度神经网络必须平衡稳定性（即保留先验知识）和可塑性（即适应新任务）。标准的重置方法，即将权重重置回其原始值，被广泛应用，但难以调整：保守的重置无法恢复可塑性，而激进的重置会抹去有用的知识。我们提出 FIRE，一种基于原则的重置方法，可以显式地平衡稳定性和可塑性之间的权衡。FIRE 通过平方弗罗贝尼乌斯范数误差 (SFE) 量化稳定性，测量与过去权重的接近程度，并通过偏离等距性 (DfI) 反映权重各向同性，从而量化可塑性。通过解决一个约束优化问题，最小化 SFE，同时约束 DfI 为零，从而获得重置点，该优化问题可以通过 Newton-Schulz 迭代算法高效地近似求解。我们在持续视觉学习（使用 ResNet-18 的 CIFAR-10）、语言建模（使用 GPT-0.1B 的 OpenWebText）和强化学习（使用 SAC 的 HumanoidBench 以及使用 DQN 的 Atari 游戏）中评估了 FIRE。在所有领域中，FIRE 始终优于不进行干预的朴素训练和标准的重置方法，证明了其对稳定性和可塑性权衡的有效平衡。

title: Preference Conditioned Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning: Decomposed, Diversity-Driven Policy Optimization
summary: Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) seeks to learn policies that balance multiple, often conflicting objectives. Although a single preference-conditioned policy is the most flexible and scalable solution, existing approaches remain brittle in practice, frequently failing to recover complete Pareto fronts. We show that this failure stems from two structural issues in current methods: destructive gradient interference caused by premature scalarization and representational collapse across the preference space. We introduce $D^3PO$, a PPO-based framework that reorganizes multi-objective policy optimization to address these issues directly. $D^3PO$ preserves per-objective learning signals through a decomposed optimization pipeline and integrates preferences only after stabilization, enabling reliable credit assignment. In addition, a scaled diversity regularizer enforces sensitivity of policy behavior to preference changes, preventing collapse. Across standard MORL benchmarks, including high-dimensional and many-objective control tasks, $D^3PO$ consistently discovers broader and higher-quality Pareto fronts than prior single- and multi-policy methods, matching or exceeding state-of-the-art hypervolume and expected utility while using a single deployable policy.
tldr: The paper introduces $D^3PO$, a PPO-based multi-objective reinforcement learning framework that addresses issues of gradient interference and representational collapse to achieve broader and higher-quality Pareto fronts with a single policy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个基于PPO的多目标强化学习框架$D^3PO$。该框架解决了梯度干涉和表征崩溃的问题，从而使用单个策略实现了更广泛和更高质量的Pareto前沿。
summary_zh: 多目标强化学习 (MORL) 旨在学习平衡多个通常相互冲突目标的策略。虽然单一偏好条件策略是最灵活和可扩展的解决方案，但现有方法在实践中仍然脆弱，经常无法恢复完整的帕累托前沿。我们发现这种失败源于当前方法中的两个结构性问题：由过早标量化引起的破坏性梯度干扰，以及在偏好空间中的表征崩溃。我们提出了 $D^3PO$，这是一个基于PPO的框架，它重新组织了多目标策略优化以直接解决这些问题。$D^3PO$ 通过分解的优化流程保留了每个目标的学习信号，并在稳定之后才整合偏好，从而实现可靠的信用分配。此外，一个缩放的多样性正则化器强制了策略行为对偏好变化的敏感性，防止了崩溃。在包括高维和多目标的控制任务的标准MORL基准测试中，$D^3PO$ 始终如一地发现比先前的单策略和多策略方法更广泛和更高质量的帕累托前沿，在使用单一可部署策略的同时，匹配或超过了最先进的超体积和期望效用。

title: The Laplacian Keyboard: Beyond the Linear Span
summary: Across scientific disciplines, Laplacian eigenvectors serve as a fundamental basis for simplifying complex systems, from signal processing to quantum mechanics. In reinforcement learning (RL), these eigenvectors provide a natural basis for approximating reward functions; however, their use is typically limited to their linear span, which restricts expressivity in complex environments. We introduce the Laplacian Keyboard (LK), a hierarchical framework that goes beyond the linear span. LK constructs a task-agnostic library of options from these eigenvectors, forming a behavior basis guaranteed to contain the optimal policy for any reward within the linear span. A meta-policy learns to stitch these options dynamically, enabling efficient learning of policies outside the original linear constraints. We establish theoretical bounds on zero-shot approximation error and demonstrate empirically that LK surpasses zero-shot solutions while achieving improved sample efficiency compared to standard RL methods.
tldr: The paper introduces Laplacian Keyboard (LK), a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework using Laplacian eigenvectors to construct a task-agnostic option library, enabling efficient learning beyond the linear span of the eigenvectors. It demonstrates improved sample efficiency and zero-shot performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了拉普拉斯键盘 (LK)，一个分层强化学习框架，利用拉普拉斯特征向量构建与任务无关的选项库，从而能够在特征向量的线性跨度之外进行高效学习。 它展示了更高的样本效率和零样本性能。
summary_zh: 拉普拉斯特征向量作为简化复杂系统的基础，广泛应用于信号处理和量子力学等科学领域。在强化学习（RL）中，这些特征向量为近似奖励函数提供了天然的基底；然而，其应用通常局限于线性张成空间，从而限制了在复杂环境中的表达能力。我们引入了拉普拉斯键盘（LK），一种超越线性张成的分层框架。LK从这些特征向量构建了一个与任务无关的选项库，形成了一个行为基底，保证包含线性张成空间内任何奖励的最优策略。一个元策略学习动态地拼接这些选项，从而能够高效地学习原始线性约束之外的策略。我们建立了对零样本近似误差的理论界限，并通过实验证明，LK超越了零样本解决方案，同时相比标准RL方法实现了更高的样本效率。

title: Surprisal-Guided Selection: Compute-Optimal Test-Time Strategies for Execution-Grounded Code Generation
summary: Test-time training (TTT) adapts language models through gradient-based updates at inference. But is adaptation the right strategy? We study compute-optimal test-time strategies for verifiable execution-grounded (VEG) tasks, domains like GPU kernel optimization where a deterministic evaluator provides dense, continuous reward signals. Using KernelBench as our testbed and a 120B-parameter model (GPT-OSS-120B with LoRA adaptation), we find that search outperforms minimal adaptation (1-5 gradient steps): Best-of-N sampling achieves 90% task success (18/20 tasks) at K=64 across the full KernelBench L1 eval set while TTT's best checkpoint reaches only 30.6% (3-seed mean), with TTT's "equivalent K" falling below 1, worse than single-sample inference. The failure mode is over-sharpening: gradient updates collapse diversity toward mediocre solutions rather than discovering optimal ones. Our main contribution is surprisal-guided selection: selecting the highest-surprisal (lowest-confidence) correct sample yields 80% success vs. 50% for most-confident selection, a 30% improvement. Extending to surprisal-guided-top3 matches oracle performance at 100%. This zero-cost strategy, validated through length-controlled analysis, recovers oracle performance. For dense-reward VEG tasks, compute should be allocated to sample diversity and intelligent selection rather than gradient adaptation. The surprisal-guided selection principle may generalize to other execution-grounded domains where optimal solutions occupy the distribution tail.
tldr: This paper finds that for execution-grounded code generation tasks with dense rewards, search with surprisal-guided selection outperforms test-time training by better exploring the solution space and identifying optimal solutions in the distribution tail.
tldr_zh: 该论文发现在具有密集奖励的执行型代码生成任务中，利用惊奇度引导选择的搜索方法优于测试时训练，因为它能更好地探索解空间并识别分布尾部的最优解。
summary_zh: 测试时训练（TTT）通过在推理时基于梯度的更新来适配语言模型。但适配是正确的策略吗？我们研究了针对可验证执行接地（VEG）任务的计算最优测试时策略，这些任务领域包括GPU内核优化，一个确定性评估器提供密集、连续的奖励信号。以KernelBench作为我们的测试平台，并使用一个1200亿参数的模型（GPT-OSS-120B，使用LoRA适配），我们发现搜索优于最小适配（1-5步梯度更新）：最佳N抽样在整个KernelBench L1评估集中以K=64实现了90%的任务成功率（18/20个任务），而TTT的最佳检查点仅达到30.6%（3种子均值），TTT的“等效K值”低于1，比单样本推理更差。失败模式是过度锐化：梯度更新将多样性朝着平庸的解决方案坍缩，而不是发现最优解。我们的主要贡献是惊奇度引导选择：选择惊奇度最高（置信度最低）的正确样本产生80%的成功率，而选择置信度最高的样本仅产生50%的成功率，提高了30%。扩展到惊奇度引导的前3名匹配了100%的预言机性能。这种零成本策略，通过长度控制分析验证，恢复了预言机性能。对于密集奖励的VEG任务，计算应该分配给样本多样性和智能选择，而不是梯度适配。惊奇度引导选择原则可能推广到其他执行接地领域，在这些领域中，最优解占据了分布的尾部。

title: ReRoPE: Repurposing RoPE for Relative Camera Control
summary: Video generation with controllable camera viewpoints is essential for applications such as interactive content creation, gaming, and simulation. Existing methods typically adapt pre-trained video models using camera poses relative to a fixed reference, e.g., the first frame. However, these encodings lack shift-invariance, often leading to poor generalization and accumulated drift. While relative camera pose embeddings defined between arbitrary view pairs offer a more robust alternative, integrating them into pre-trained video diffusion models without prohibitive training costs or architectural changes remains challenging. We introduce ReRoPE, a plug-and-play framework that incorporates relative camera information into pre-trained video diffusion models without compromising their generation capability. Our approach is based on the insight that Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE) in existing models underutilize their full spectral bandwidth, particularly in the low-frequency components. By seamlessly injecting relative camera pose information into these underutilized bands, ReRoPE achieves precise control while preserving strong pre-trained generative priors. We evaluate our method on both image-to-video (I2V) and video-to-video (V2V) tasks in terms of camera control accuracy and visual fidelity. Our results demonstrate that ReRoPE offers a training-efficient path toward controllable, high-fidelity video generation. See project page for more results: https://sisyphe-lee.github.io/ReRoPE/
tldr: The paper introduces ReRoPE, a method for integrating relative camera pose information into pre-trained video diffusion models by exploiting underutilized spectral bandwidth in RoPE embeddings, enabling controllable and high-fidelity video generation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ReRoPE，一种通过利用RoPE嵌入中未充分利用的频谱带宽将相对相机姿态信息集成到预训练视频扩散模型中的方法，从而实现可控和高保真视频生成。
