summary_zh: 可控视角视频生成对于交互式内容创作、游戏和仿真等应用至关重要。现有方法通常使用相对于固定参考系（例如第一帧）的相机姿态来调整预训练的视频模型。然而，这些编码缺乏平移不变性，常常导致泛化能力差和累积漂移。虽然定义在任意视角对之间的相对相机姿态嵌入提供了一种更稳健的替代方案，但在不产生过高的训练成本或架构变动的情况下，将其集成到预训练的视频扩散模型中仍然具有挑战性。我们引入了 ReRoPE，这是一个即插即用的框架，可将相对相机信息整合到预训练的视频扩散模型中，而不会损害其生成能力。我们的方法基于这样的洞察：现有模型中的旋转位置嵌入 (RoPE) 没有充分利用其完整的频谱带宽，尤其是在低频分量中。通过将相对相机姿态信息无缝地注入到这些未充分利用的频段中，ReRoPE 实现了精确控制，同时保留了强大的预训练生成先验。我们在图像到视频 (I2V) 和视频到视频 (V2V) 任务中，从相机控制准确性和视觉保真度方面评估了我们的方法。结果表明，ReRoPE 为可控、高保真视频生成提供了一种训练高效的途径。更多结果请参见项目页面：https://sisyphe-lee.github.io/ReRoPE/

title: EasyTune: Efficient Step-Aware Fine-Tuning for Diffusion-Based Motion Generation
summary: In recent years, motion generative models have undergone significant advancement, yet pose challenges in aligning with downstream objectives. Recent studies have shown that using differentiable rewards to directly align the preference of diffusion models yields promising results. However, these methods suffer from (1) inefficient and coarse-grained optimization with (2) high memory consumption. In this work, we first theoretically and empirically identify the key reason of these limitations: the recursive dependence between different steps in the denoising trajectory. Inspired by this insight, we propose EasyTune, which fine-tunes diffusion at each denoising step rather than over the entire trajectory. This decouples the recursive dependence, allowing us to perform (1) a dense and fine-grained, and (2) memory-efficient optimization. Furthermore, the scarcity of preference motion pairs restricts the availability of motion reward model training. To this end, we further introduce a Self-refinement Preference Learning (SPL) mechanism that dynamically identifies preference pairs and conducts preference learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EasyTune outperforms DRaFT-50 by 8.2% in alignment (MM-Dist) improvement while requiring only 31.16% of its additional memory overhead and achieving a 7.3x training speedup. The project page is available at this link {https://xiaofeng-tan.github.io/projects/EasyTune/index.html}.
tldr: The paper proposes EasyTune, a method for efficient and fine-grained fine-tuning of diffusion-based motion generation models by addressing recursive dependencies between denoising steps and introducing a self-refinement preference learning mechanism. The approach demonstrates improved alignment and efficiency compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了EasyTune，一种高效且细粒度的扩散运动生成模型微调方法，通过解决去噪步骤之间的递归依赖关系，并引入了自精炼偏好学习机制。该方法相较于现有方法，在对齐性和效率方面均有所提升。
summary_zh: 近年来，运动生成模型取得了显著进展，但在与下游目标对齐方面仍面临挑战。最近的研究表明，使用可微分奖励直接对齐扩散模型的偏好会产生令人满意的结果。然而，这些方法存在以下问题：(1)低效且粗粒度的优化，以及(2)高内存消耗。在这项工作中，我们首先从理论上和经验上确定了这些局限性的关键原因：去噪轨迹中不同步骤之间的递归依赖关系。受此启发，我们提出了 EasyTune，它在每个去噪步骤中微调扩散模型，而不是在整个轨迹上进行微调。这解耦了递归依赖关系，使我们能够进行(1)密集且细粒度的优化，以及(2)内存高效的优化。此外，偏好运动对的稀缺性限制了运动奖励模型训练的可用性。为此，我们进一步引入了一种自精炼偏好学习（SPL）机制，该机制动态识别偏好对并进行偏好学习。大量实验表明，EasyTune 在对齐（MM-Dist）改进方面优于 DRaFT-50 8.2%，同时仅需其额外内存开销的 31.16%，并实现了 7.3 倍的训练速度提升。项目页面可在以下链接获得：{https://xiaofeng-tan.github.io/projects/EasyTune/index.html}。

title: Efficient Anti-exploration via VQVAE and Fuzzy Clustering in Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: Pseudo-count is an effective anti-exploration method in offline reinforcement learning (RL) by counting state-action pairs and imposing a large penalty on rare or unseen state-action pair data. Existing anti-exploration methods count continuous state-action pairs by discretizing these data, but often suffer from the issues of dimension disaster and information loss in the discretization process, leading to efficiency and performance reduction, and even failure of policy learning. In this paper, a novel anti-exploration method based on Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQVAE) and fuzzy clustering in offline RL is proposed. We first propose an efficient pseudo-count method based on the multi-codebook VQVAE to discretize state-action pairs, and design an offline RL anti-exploitation method based on the proposed pseudo-count method to handle the dimension disaster issue and improve the learning efficiency. In addition, a codebook update mechanism based on fuzzy C-means (FCM) clustering is developed to improve the use rate of vectors in codebooks, addressing the information loss issue in the discretization process. The proposed method is evaluated on the benchmark of Datasets for Deep Data-Driven Reinforcement Learning (D4RL), and experimental results show that the proposed method performs better and requires less computing cost in multiple complex tasks compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel anti-exploration method for offline reinforcement learning using VQVAE and fuzzy clustering to address the curse of dimensionality and information loss issues associated with naive discretization approaches, demonstrating improved performance and efficiency on D4RL benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的离线强化学习反探索方法，该方法使用 VQVAE 和模糊聚类来解决朴素离散化方法相关的维度灾难和信息损失问题，并在 D4RL 基准测试中表现出改进的性能和效率。
summary_zh: 伪计数是一种有效的离线强化学习 (RL) 反探索方法，它通过统计状态-动作对，并对稀有或未见过的状态-动作对数据施加大的惩罚。现有的反探索方法通过离散化连续状态-动作对来计数，但通常会受到维度灾难和离散化过程中信息损失的问题困扰，导致效率和性能下降，甚至导致策略学习失败。本文提出了一种基于向量量化变分自编码器 (VQVAE) 和模糊聚类的离线 RL 反探索新方法。我们首先提出了一种基于多码本 VQVAE 的高效伪计数方法来离散化状态-动作对，并设计了一种基于所提出的伪计数方法的离线 RL 反利用方法来解决维度灾难问题并提高学习效率。此外，我们还开发了一种基于模糊 C 均值 (FCM) 聚类的码本更新机制，以提高码本中向量的使用率，从而解决离散化过程中信息损失的问题。所提出的方法在深度数据驱动强化学习数据集 (D4RL) 基准上进行了评估，实验结果表明，与最先进 (SOTA) 方法相比，所提出的方法在多个复杂任务中表现更好，且计算成本更低。

title: Efficient Planning in Reinforcement Learning via Model Introspection
summary: Reinforcement learning and classical planning are typically seen as two distinct problems, with differing formulations necessitating different solutions. Yet, when humans are given a task, regardless of the way it is specified, they can often derive the additional information needed to solve the problem efficiently. The key to this ability is introspection: by reasoning about their internal models of the problem, humans directly synthesize additional task-relevant information. In this paper, we propose that this introspection can be thought of as program analysis. We discuss examples of how this approach can be applied to various kinds of models used in reinforcement learning. We then describe an algorithm that enables efficient goal-oriented planning over the class of models used in relational reinforcement learning, demonstrating a novel link between reinforcement learning and classical planning.
tldr: This paper proposes a novel approach to reinforcement learning that leverages model introspection, inspired by human reasoning, to bridge the gap between RL and classical planning, particularly for relational RL models.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的强化学习方法，该方法利用模型内省，灵感来自人类推理，以弥合强化学习和经典规划之间的差距，尤其是在关系强化学习模型中。
summary_zh: 强化学习和经典规划通常被视为两个不同的问题，它们的公式表述各异，需要不同的解决方案。然而，当人类被赋予一项任务时，无论其规范方式如何，他们通常能够推导出解决问题所需的额外信息，从而高效地完成任务。这种能力的关键在于内省：通过推理他们对问题的内部模型，人类可以直接合成与任务相关的额外信息。在本文中，我们提出这种内省可以被视为程序分析。我们讨论了如何将此方法应用于强化学习中使用的各种模型的例子。然后，我们描述了一种能够在关系强化学习中使用的模型类上进行高效的面向目标规划的算法，展示了强化学习和经典规划之间的一种新的联系。

title: Analyzing the Impact of Simulation Fidelity on the Evaluation of Autonomous Driving Motion Control
summary: Simulation is crucial in the development of autonomous driving software. In particular, assessing control algorithms requires an accurate vehicle dynamics simulation. However, recent publications use models with varying levels of detail. This disparity makes it difficult to compare individual control algorithms. Therefore, this paper aims to investigate the influence of the fidelity of vehicle dynamics modeling on the closed-loop behavior of trajectory-following controllers. For this purpose, we introduce a comprehensive Autoware-compatible vehicle model. By simplifying this, we derive models with varying fidelity. Evaluating over 550 simulation runs allows us to quantify each model's approximation quality compared to real-world data. Furthermore, we investigate whether the influence of model simplifications changes with varying margins to the acceleration limit of the vehicle. From this, we deduce to which degree a vehicle model can be simplified to evaluate control algorithms depending on the specific application. The real-world data used to validate the simulation environment originate from the Indy Autonomous Challenge race at the Autodromo Nazionale di Monza in June 2023. They show the fastest fully autonomous lap of TUM Autonomous Motorsport, with vehicle speeds reaching 267 kph and lateral accelerations of up to 15 mps2.
tldr: This paper analyzes the impact of vehicle dynamics simulation fidelity on autonomous driving control algorithm evaluation, providing insights into model simplification for specific applications and validating with real-world race data.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了车辆动力学仿真保真度对自动驾驶控制算法评估的影响，深入了解了针对特定应用的模型简化方法，并使用真实世界赛车数据进行了验证。
summary_zh: 仿真对于自动驾驶软件的开发至关重要。尤其是在评估控制算法时，需要精确的车辆动力学仿真。然而，近期发表的文章使用了不同精细程度的模型。这种差异使得比较单个控制算法变得困难。因此，本文旨在研究车辆动力学建模的保真度对轨迹跟踪控制器的闭环行为的影响。为此，我们引入了一个全面的、兼容Autoware的车辆模型。通过简化该模型，我们推导出具有不同保真度的模型。通过超过550次的仿真运行，我们能够量化每种模型与真实世界数据相比的近似质量。此外，我们还研究了模型简化带来的影响是否会随着车辆加速极限裕量的变化而变化。由此，我们推断出在评估控制算法时，根据具体应用可以将车辆模型简化到何种程度。用于验证仿真环境的真实世界数据来源于2023年6月在意大利蒙扎国家赛车场举行的 Indy 自动驾驶挑战赛。这些数据展示了 TUM 自动驾驶赛车的最快全自动驾驶圈，车辆速度达到 267 公里/小时，横向加速度高达 15 米/秒平方。

title: Global Symmetry and Orthogonal Transformations from Geometrical Moment $n$-tuples
summary: Detecting symmetry is crucial for effective object grasping for several reasons. Recognizing symmetrical features or axes within an object helps in developing efficient grasp strategies, as grasping along these axes typically results in a more stable and balanced grip, thereby facilitating successful manipulation. This paper employs geometrical moments to identify symmetries and estimate orthogonal transformations, including rotations and mirror transformations, for objects centered at the frame origin. It provides distinctive metrics for detecting symmetries and estimating orthogonal transformations, encompassing rotations, reflections, and their combinations. A comprehensive methodology is developed to obtain these functions in n-dimensional space, specifically moment \( n \)-tuples. Extensive validation tests are conducted on both 2D and 3D objects to ensure the robustness and reliability of the proposed approach. The proposed method is also compared to state-of-the-art work using iterative optimization for detecting multiple planes of symmetry. The results indicate that combining our method with the iterative one yields satisfactory outcomes in terms of the number of symmetry planes detected and computation time.
tldr: This paper introduces a method using geometrical moments to detect object symmetries and estimate orthogonal transformations in n-dimensional space, showing improved performance when combined with iterative optimization methods, particularly for object grasping in robotics.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用几何矩在 n 维空间中检测对象对称性和估计正交变换的方法，与迭代优化方法结合使用时，性能有所提高，尤其是在机器人抓取方面。
summary_zh: 检测对称性对于有效的目标抓取至关重要，原因如下。识别目标内部的对称特征或轴有助于开发高效的抓取策略，因为沿着这些轴进行抓取通常会产生更稳定和平衡的抓握，从而促进成功的操作。本文采用几何矩来识别对称性并估计正交变换，包括围绕坐标系原点为中心的物体的旋转变换和镜像变换。它提供了用于检测对称性和估计正交变换（包括旋转、反射及其组合）的独特度量。开发了一种全面的方法，在 n 维空间中获得这些函数，特别是矩 \( n \) 元组。对 2D 和 3D 对象进行了广泛的验证测试，以确保所提出方法的稳健性和可靠性。还将该方法与使用迭代优化检测多个对称平面的最先进工作进行了比较。结果表明，将我们的方法与迭代方法相结合，在检测到的对称平面数量和计算时间方面都能获得令人满意的结果。

title: Looking and Listening Inside and Outside: Multimodal Artificial Intelligence Systems for Driver Safety Assessment and Intelligent Vehicle Decision-Making
summary: The looking-in-looking-out (LILO) framework has enabled intelligent vehicle applications that understand both the outside scene and the driver state to improve safety outcomes, with examples in smart airbag deployment, takeover time prediction in autonomous control transitions, and driver attention monitoring. In this research, we propose an augmentation to this framework, making a case for the audio modality as an additional source of information to understand the driver, and in the evolving autonomy landscape, also the passengers and those outside the vehicle. We expand LILO by incorporating audio signals, forming the looking-and-listening inside-and-outside (L-LIO) framework to enhance driver state assessment and environment understanding through multimodal sensor fusion. We evaluate three example cases where audio enhances vehicle safety: supervised learning on driver speech audio to classify potential impairment states (e.g., intoxication), collection and analysis of passenger natural language instructions (e.g., "turn after that red building") to motivate how spoken language can interface with planning systems through audio-aligned instruction data, and limitations of vision-only systems where audio may disambiguate the guidance and gestures of external agents. Datasets include custom-collected in-vehicle and external audio samples in real-world environments. Pilot findings show that audio yields safety-relevant insights, particularly in nuanced or context-rich scenarios where sound is critical to safe decision-making or visual signals alone are insufficient. Challenges include ambient noise interference, privacy considerations, and robustness across human subjects, motivating further work on reliability in dynamic real-world contexts. L-LIO augments driver and scene understanding through multimodal fusion of audio and visual sensing, offering new paths for safety intervention.
tldr: This paper introduces the L-LIO framework, which incorporates audio into the existing LILO framework for improved driver and environment understanding, demonstrating its potential through case studies involving driver impairment detection, passenger instruction understanding, and disambiguation of external agent communication.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了L-LIO框架，该框架将音频整合到现有的LILO框架中，以提高驾驶员和环境的理解能力，并通过驾驶员损伤检测、乘客指令理解和消除外部代理通信歧义的案例研究展示了其潜力。
summary_zh: “向内看、向外看”（LILO）框架已使智能车辆应用成为可能，这些应用能够理解外部场景和驾驶员状态，从而提高安全性能，例如智能气囊展开、自主控制转换中的接管时间预测以及驾驶员注意力监测。在本研究中，我们对该框架提出了一种改进方案，论证了将音频模态作为一种额外的信息来源，以了解驾驶员，并在不断发展的自动驾驶领域中，也了解乘客和车外人员。我们通过整合音频信号来扩展LILO，形成“内部和外部视听”（L-LIO）框架，以通过多模态传感器融合增强驾驶员状态评估和环境理解。我们评估了三个音频增强车辆安全性的示例案例：基于驾驶员语音音频的监督学习来分类潜在的损伤状态（例如，醉酒），收集和分析乘客的自然语言指令（例如，“在那栋红色建筑物后转弯”）以说明口语如何通过音频对齐的指令数据与规划系统交互，以及仅视觉系统的局限性，其中音频可以消除外部人员的引导和手势的歧义。数据集包括在真实环境中自定义收集的车内和外部音频样本。初步研究结果表明，音频能够产生与安全相关的见解，尤其是在细微或上下文丰富的场景中，在这些场景中，声音对于安全决策至关重要，或者仅视觉信号不足。挑战包括环境噪声干扰、隐私考虑以及跨人类主体的鲁棒性，促使进一步研究动态真实环境中的可靠性。L-LIO通过音频和视觉传感的多模态融合增强了驾驶员和场景理解，为安全干预提供了新的途径。

title: Weak to Strong: VLM-Based Pseudo-Labeling as a Weakly Supervised Training Strategy in Multimodal Video-based Hidden Emotion Understanding Tasks
summary: To tackle the automatic recognition of "concealed emotions" in videos, this paper proposes a multimodal weak-supervision framework and achieves state-of-the-art results on the iMiGUE tennis-interview dataset. First, YOLO 11x detects and crops human portraits frame-by-frame, and DINOv2-Base extracts visual features from the cropped regions. Next, by integrating Chain-of-Thought and Reflection prompting (CoT + Reflection), Gemini 2.5 Pro automatically generates pseudo-labels and reasoning texts that serve as weak supervision for downstream models. Subsequently, OpenPose produces 137-dimensional key-point sequences, augmented with inter-frame offset features; the usual graph neural network backbone is simplified to an MLP to efficiently model the spatiotemporal relationships of the three key-point streams. An ultra-long-sequence Transformer independently encodes both the image and key-point sequences, and their representations are concatenated with BERT-encoded interview transcripts. Each modality is first pre-trained in isolation, then fine-tuned jointly, with pseudo-labeled samples merged into the training set for further gains. Experiments demonstrate that, despite severe class imbalance, the proposed approach lifts accuracy from under 0.6 in prior work to over 0.69, establishing a new public benchmark. The study also validates that an "MLP-ified" key-point backbone can match - or even surpass - GCN-based counterparts in this task.
tldr: This paper proposes a multimodal weak-supervision framework using VLM-generated pseudo-labels to achieve state-of-the-art results in multimodal video-based hidden emotion recognition, specifically on the iMiGUE tennis-interview dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种多模态弱监督框架，利用视觉语言模型生成的伪标签，在多模态视频隐藏情感识别任务上取得了最先进的结果，特别是在 iMiGUE 网球访谈数据集上。
summary_zh: 为解决视频中“隐藏情绪”的自动识别问题，本文提出了一种多模态弱监督框架，并在iMiGUE网球访谈数据集上取得了目前最优的结果。首先，YOLO 11x逐帧检测并裁剪人像，DINOv2-Base从裁剪区域中提取视觉特征。其次，通过整合思维链和反思提示（CoT + Reflection），Gemini 2.5 Pro自动生成伪标签和推理文本，以此作为下游模型的弱监督。随后，OpenPose生成137维关键点序列，并辅以帧间偏移特征；常用的图神经网络主干被简化为MLP，以有效建模三个关键点流的时空关系。一个超长序列Transformer独立编码图像和关键点序列，并将它们的表示与BERT编码的访谈文本连接起来。每种模态首先独立预训练，然后联合微调，并将伪标签样本合并到训练集中以获得进一步提升。实验表明，尽管存在严重的类别不平衡，所提出的方法将准确率从先前工作的0.6以下提高到0.69以上，建立了一个新的公开基准。该研究还验证了在这一任务中，“MLP化”的关键点主干可以匹配甚至超过基于GCN的同类方法。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Counterfactual Traffic Signal Control with Predictive Safety and Starvation-Avoidance Constraints Using Vision-Based Sensing
summary: Real-world deployment of adaptive traffic signal control, to date, remains limited due to the uncertainty associated with vision-based perception, implicit safety, and non-interpretable control policies learned and validated mainly in simulation. In this paper, we introduce UCATSC, a model-based traffic signal control system that models traffic signal control at an intersection using a stochastic decision process with constraints and under partial observability, taking into account the uncertainty associated with vision-based perception. Unlike reinforcement learning methods that learn to predict safety using reward shaping, UCATSC predicts and enforces hard constraints related to safety and starvation prevention during counterfactual rollouts in belief space. The system is designed to improve traffic delay and emission while preventing safety-critical errors and providing interpretable control policy outputs based on explicit models.
tldr: The paper introduces UCATSC, a model-based traffic signal control system that uses counterfactual reasoning in belief space to improve traffic flow while ensuring safety and interpretability under perceptual uncertainty. It improves upon RL methods by incorporating hard safety and starvation constraints.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为UCATSC的基于模型的交通信号控制系统，该系统使用信念空间中的反事实推理来改善交通流量，同时在感知不确定性的情况下确保安全性和可解释性。它通过结合硬性安全和避免空转约束，改进了强化学习方法。
summary_zh: 自适应交通信号控制在现实世界的部署至今仍受到限制，主要是由于基于视觉感知的相关不确定性、隐性安全性以及主要在仿真中学习和验证的不可解释的控制策略。本文介绍了一种基于模型的交通信号控制系统UCATSC，该系统利用一个带约束的随机决策过程，在部分可观测的条件下对交叉路口的交通信号控制进行建模，同时考虑了与基于视觉感知的相关不确定性。与使用奖励塑造学习预测安全性的强化学习方法不同，UCATSC在信念空间中的反事实推演过程中预测并执行与安全和防止交通拥堵相关的硬性约束。该系统旨在改善交通延误和排放，同时防止危及安全性的错误，并基于显式模型提供可解释的控制策略输出。

title: Optimized Human-Robot Co-Dispatch Planning for Petro-Site Surveillance under Varying Criticalities
summary: Securing petroleum infrastructure requires balancing autonomous system efficiency with human judgment for threat escalation, a challenge unaddressed by classical facility location models assuming homogeneous resources. This paper formulates the Human-Robot Co-Dispatch Facility Location Problem (HRCD-FLP), a capacitated facility location variant incorporating tiered infrastructure criticality, human-robot supervision ratio constraints, and minimum utilization requirements. We evaluate command center selection across three technology maturity scenarios. Results show transitioning from conservative (1:3 human-robot supervision) to future autonomous operations (1:10) yields significant cost reduction while maintaining complete critical infrastructure coverage. For small problems, exact methods dominate in both cost and computation time; for larger problems, the proposed heuristic achieves feasible solutions in under 3 minutes with approximately 14% optimality gap where comparison is possible. From systems perspective, our work demonstrate that optimized planning for human-robot teaming is key to achieve both cost-effective and mission-reliable deployments.
tldr: The paper proposes a Human-Robot Co-Dispatch Facility Location Problem (HRCD-FLP) for optimizing human-robot teams in petro-site surveillance to minimize cost while maintaining infrastructure coverage, showing significant cost reduction with increased autonomy.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个人-机器人协同调度设施定位问题(HRCD-FLP)，旨在优化石油设施监控中的人-机器人团队，在保证基础设施覆盖的同时最小化成本。研究表明，提高自主性可以显著降低成本。
summary_zh: 保护石油基础设施需要平衡自主系统效率与人类判断在威胁升级方面的作用，这是一个经典设施选址模型（假设资源同质）尚未解决的挑战。本文提出了人机协同调度设施选址问题（HRCD-FLP），这是一种考虑分层基础设施关键性、人机监督比率约束和最低利用率要求的有容量约束的设施选址变体。我们评估了三种技术成熟度情景下的指挥中心选择。结果表明，从保守的（1:3人机监督）到未来的自主运营（1:10），可以在保持关键基础设施完整覆盖的前提下显著降低成本。对于小型问题，精确方法在成本和计算时间上均占优势；对于大型问题，所提出的启发式算法可以在3分钟内获得可行解，且在可比较的情况下，最优性差距约为14%。从系统角度来看，我们的工作表明，优化人机团队的规划是实现经济高效且任务可靠部署的关键。

title: Incremental Mapping with Measurement Synchronization & Compression
summary: Modern autonomous vehicles and robots utilize versatile sensors for localization and mapping. The fidelity of these maps is paramount, as an accurate environmental representation is a prerequisite for stable and precise localization. Factor graphs provide a powerful approach for sensor fusion, enabling the estimation of the maximum a posteriori solution. However, the discrete nature of graph-based representations, combined with asynchronous sensor measurements, complicates consistent state estimation. The design of an optimal factor graph topology remains an open challenge, especially in multi-sensor systems with asynchronous data. Conventional approaches rely on a rigid graph structure, which becomes inefficient with sensors of disparate rates. Although preintegration techniques can mitigate this for high-rate sensors, their applicability is limited. To address this problem, this work introduces a novel approach that incrementally constructs connected factor graphs, ensuring the incorporation of all available sensor data by choosing the optimal graph topology based on the external evaluation criteria. The proposed methodology facilitates graph compression, reducing the number of nodes (optimized variables) by ~30% on average while maintaining map quality at a level comparable to conventional approaches.
tldr: This paper introduces a method for incrementally constructing and compressing factor graphs for multi-sensor fusion in robotics, aiming to improve map accuracy and efficiency by optimizing graph topology and reducing the number of nodes.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于机器人多传感器融合的增量构建和压缩因子图的方法，旨在通过优化图拓扑结构和减少节点数量来提高地图的准确性和效率。
summary_zh: 现代自动驾驶车辆和机器人利用多样化的传感器进行定位和建图。这些地图的保真度至关重要，因为准确的环境表示是稳定和精确定位的前提。因子图为传感器融合提供了一种强大的方法，能够估计最大后验解。然而，基于图表示的离散性质，结合异步传感器测量，使得一致的状态估计变得复杂。最优因子图拓扑的设计仍然是一个公开的挑战，尤其是在具有异步数据的多传感器系统中。传统方法依赖于刚性的图结构，这使得在使用不同速率的传感器时变得效率低下。尽管预积分技术可以缓解高频率传感器的问题，但其适用性受到限制。为了解决这个问题，本工作提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法增量式地构建连接的因子图，通过基于外部评估标准选择最优图拓扑，确保所有可用传感器数据的纳入。所提出的方法有助于图压缩，在保持与传统方法相当的地图质量的同时，平均减少约30%的节点数量（优化变量）。

title: Research on a Camera Position Measurement Method based on a Parallel Perspective Error Transfer Model
summary: Camera pose estimation from sparse correspondences is a fundamental problem in geometric computer vision and remains particularly challenging in near-field scenarios, where strong perspective effects and heterogeneous measurement noise can significantly degrade the stability of analytic PnP solutions. In this paper, we present a geometric error propagation framework for camera pose estimation based on a parallel perspective approximation. By explicitly modeling how image measurement errors propagate through perspective geometry, we derive an error transfer model that characterizes the relationship between feature point distribution, camera depth, and pose estimation uncertainty. Building on this analysis, we develop a pose estimation method that leverages parallel perspective initialization and error-aware weighting within a Gauss-Newton optimization scheme, leading to improved robustness in proximity operations. Extensive experiments on both synthetic data and real-world images, covering diverse conditions such as strong illumination, surgical lighting, and underwater low-light environments, demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves accuracy and robustness comparable to state-of-the-art analytic and iterative PnP methods, while maintaining high computational efficiency. These results highlight the importance of explicit geometric error modeling for reliable camera pose estimation in challenging near-field settings.
tldr: This paper presents a camera pose estimation method using a parallel perspective error transfer model, improving robustness in near-field scenarios with challenging lighting conditions. The method achieves comparable accuracy and robustness to state-of-the-art PnP methods with high computational efficiency.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于平行透视误差传递模型的相机姿态估计方法，提高了在具有挑战性光照条件下的近场场景中的鲁棒性。该方法在保持高计算效率的同时，实现了与最先进的 PnP 方法相当的准确性和鲁棒性。
summary_zh:
摘要：
基于稀疏对应点的相机位姿估计是几何计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，并且在近场场景中仍然具有挑战性，在这些场景中，强烈的透视效应和异构测量噪声会显著降低解析PnP解的稳定性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于平行透视近似的相机位姿估计几何误差传播框架。通过显式地建模图像测量误差如何通过透视几何传播，我们推导出一个误差传递模型，该模型描述了特征点分布、相机深度和位姿估计不确定性之间的关系。在此分析的基础上，我们开发了一种位姿估计方法，该方法利用平行透视初始化和高斯-牛顿优化方案中的误差感知加权，从而提高了近距离操作的鲁棒性。在合成数据和真实图像上的大量实验，涵盖了强光照、手术照明和水下低光环境等多种条件，表明所提出的方法实现了与最先进的解析和迭代PnP方法相当的精度和鲁棒性，同时保持了较高的计算效率。这些结果突显了显式几何误差建模对于在具有挑战性的近场环境中进行可靠的相机位姿估计的重要性。

title: System-Level Error Propagation and Tail-Risk Amplification in Reference-Based Robotic Navigation
summary: Image guided robotic navigation systems often rely on reference based geometric perception pipelines, where accurate spatial mapping is established through multi stage estimation processes. In biplanar X ray guided navigation, such pipelines are widely used due to their real time capability and geometric interpretability. However, navigation reliability can be constrained by an overlooked system level failure mechanism in which installation induced structural perturbations introduced at the perception stage are progressively amplified along the perception reconstruction execution chain and dominate execution level error and tail risk behavior. This paper investigates this mechanism from a system level perspective and presents a unified error propagation modeling framework that characterizes how installation induced structural perturbations propagate and couple with pixel level observation noise through biplanar imaging, projection matrix estimation, triangulation, and coordinate mapping. Using first order analytic uncertainty propagation and Monte Carlo simulations, we analyze dominant sensitivity channels and quantify worst case error behavior beyond mean accuracy metrics. The results show that rotational installation error is a primary driver of system level error amplification, while translational misalignment of comparable magnitude plays a secondary role under typical biplanar geometries. Real biplanar X ray bench top experiments further confirm that the predicted amplification trends persist under realistic imaging conditions. These findings reveal a broader structural limitation of reference based multi stage geometric perception pipelines and provide a framework for system level reliability analysis and risk aware design in safety critical robotic navigation systems.
tldr: The paper analyzes error propagation in multi-stage reference-based robotic navigation systems, especially biplanar X-ray-guided systems, showing that installation errors can be amplified through the pipeline, leading to significant inaccuracies. They provide a framework for system-level reliability analysis.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了基于多阶段参考的机器人导航系统中的误差传播，特别是双平面X射线引导系统，表明安装误差会通过管道放大，导致显着的不准确。他们提供了一个用于系统级可靠性分析的框架。
summary_zh: 图像引导机器人导航系统通常依赖于基于参考的几何感知流程，其中精确的空间映射是通过多阶段估计过程建立的。 在双平面X射线引导导航中，由于其实时性能和几何可解释性，此类流程被广泛使用。 然，导航可靠性会受到一种被忽视的系统级失效机制的限制，即在感知阶段引入的安装诱导结构扰动沿感知-重建-执行链逐渐放大，并主导执行阶段的误差和尾部风险行为。 本文从系统层面的角度研究了这种机制，并提出了一个统一的误差传播建模框架，该框架描述了安装诱导的结构扰动如何通过双平面成像、投影矩阵估计、三角测量和坐标映射来传播并与像素级观测噪声耦合。 通过一阶解析不确定性传播和蒙特卡罗模拟，我们分析了主要的敏感性通道，并在均值精度指标之外量化了最坏情况下的误差行为。 结果表明，旋转安装误差是系统级误差放大的主要驱动因素，而在典型的双平面几何结构下，同等量级的平移失准起次要作用。 实际的双平面X射线台式实验进一步证实了预测的放大趋势在真实的成像条件下依然存在。 这些发现揭示了基于参考的多阶段几何感知流程的更广泛的结构性局限性，并为安全关键型机器人导航系统中的系统级可靠性分析和风险感知设计提供了一个框架。

title: Affine Transformable Unmanned Ground Vehicle
summary: This paper develops the proof of concept for a novel affine transformable unmanned ground vehicle (ATUGV) with the capability of safe and aggressive deformation while carrying multiple payloads. The ATUGV is a multi-body system with mobile robots that can be used to power the ATUGV morphable motion, powered cells to enclose the mobile robots, unpowered cells to contain payloads, and a deformable structure to integrate cells through bars and joints. The objective is that all powered and unpowered cells motion can safely track a desired affine transformation, where an affine transformation can be decomposed into translation, rigid body rotation, and deformation. To this end, the paper first uses a deep neural network to structure cell interconnection in such a way that every cell can freely move over the deformation plane, and the entire structure can reconfigurably deform to track a desired affine transformation. Then, the mobile robots, contained by the powered cells and stepper motors, regulating the connections of the powered and unpowered cells, design the proper controls so that all cells safely track the desired affine transformation. The functionality of the proposed ATUGV is validated through hardware experimentation and simulation.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel unmanned ground vehicle (ATUGV) capable of affine transformations (translation, rotation, deformation) achieved through interconnected powered and unpowered cells controlled by mobile robots and deep neural networks. The system's functionality is validated through hardware experimentation and simulation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型无人地面车辆 (ATUGV)，它能够通过移动机器人和深度神经网络控制的互连动力和非动力单元实现仿射变换（平移、旋转、变形）。该系统的功能已通过硬件实验和仿真进行了验证。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新型仿射可变形无人地面车辆(ATUGV)的概念验证，该车辆具有安全且激进的变形能力，同时能够携带多个有效载荷。ATUGV是一个多体系统，其构成包括：用于驱动ATUGV可变形运动的移动机器人，用于封闭移动机器人的动力单元，用于容纳有效载荷的非动力单元，以及通过杆和关节将单元整合的可变形结构。目标是所有动力和非动力单元的运动都能够安全地跟踪期望的仿射变换，其中仿射变换可以分解为平移、刚体旋转和变形。为此，本文首先使用深度神经网络来构建单元互连，使得每个单元都可以在变形平面上自由移动，并且整个结构可以重新配置地变形以跟踪期望的仿射变换。然后，移动机器人（由动力单元包含）和步进电机调节动力和非动力单元的连接，设计适当的控制，以使所有单元安全地跟踪期望的仿射变换。所提出的ATUGV的功能通过硬件实验和仿真进行了验证。

title: Graph-Enhanced Deep Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Objective Unrelated Parallel Machine Scheduling
summary: The Unrelated Parallel Machine Scheduling Problem (UPMSP) with release dates, setups, and eligibility constraints presents a significant multi-objective challenge. Traditional methods struggle to balance minimizing Total Weighted Tardiness (TWT) and Total Setup Time (TST). This paper proposes a Deep Reinforcement Learning framework using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and a Graph Neural Network (GNN). The GNN effectively represents the complex state of jobs, machines, and setups, allowing the PPO agent to learn a direct scheduling policy. Guided by a multi-objective reward function, the agent simultaneously minimizes TWT and TST. Experimental results on benchmark instances demonstrate that our PPO-GNN agent significantly outperforms a standard dispatching rule and a metaheuristic, achieving a superior trade-off between both objectives. This provides a robust and scalable solution for complex manufacturing scheduling.
tldr: This paper introduces a Deep Reinforcement Learning framework using PPO and a Graph Neural Network (GNN) to solve a multi-objective Unrelated Parallel Machine Scheduling Problem, demonstrating improved performance over traditional methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种使用PPO和图神经网络（GNN）的深度强化学习框架来解决多目标不相关并行机调度问题，并证明了其性能优于传统方法。
summary_zh: 具有发布日期、准备时间和资格约束的无关并行机调度问题(UPMSP)提出了一个重要的多目标挑战。传统方法难以平衡最小化总加权延迟(TWT)和总准备时间(TST)。本文提出了一种使用近端策略优化(PPO)和图神经网络(GNN)的深度强化学习框架。GNN有效地表示了工件、机器和准备时间的复杂状态，使得PPO代理能够学习直接的调度策略。在多目标奖励函数的引导下，该代理同时最小化TWT和TST。在基准实例上的实验结果表明，我们的PPO-GNN代理显著优于标准的调度规则和一种元启发式算法，在两个目标之间实现了更好的权衡。这为复杂的制造调度提供了一种稳健且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Continuous Program Search
summary:
Genetic Programming yields interpretable programs, but small syntactic mutations can induce large, unpredictable behavioral shifts, degrading locality and sample efficiency. We frame this as an operator-design problem: learn a continuous program space where latent distance has behavioral meaning, then design mutation operators that exploit this structure without changing the evolutionary optimizer.
  We make locality measurable by tracking action-level divergence under controlled latent perturbations, identifying an empirical trust region for behavior-local continuous variation. Using a compact trading-strategy DSL with four semantic components (long/short entry and exit), we learn a matching block-factorized embedding and compare isotropic Gaussian mutation over the full latent space to geometry-compiled mutation that restricts updates to semantically paired entry--exit subspaces and proposes directions using a learned flow-based model trained on logged mutation outcomes.
  Under identical $(μ+λ)$ evolution strategies and fixed evaluation budgets across five assets, the learned mutation operator discovers strong strategies using an order of magnitude fewer evaluations and achieves the highest median out-of-sample Sharpe ratio. Although isotropic mutation occasionally attains higher peak performance, geometry-compiled mutation yields faster, more reliable progress, demonstrating that semantically aligned mutation can substantially improve search efficiency without modifying the underlying evolutionary algorithm.
tldr: The paper learns a continuous program space and a matching mutation operator for genetic programming, resulting in improved search efficiency and strategy discovery within a trading strategy DSL.
tldr_zh: 该论文学习了一个连续程序空间和一个匹配的变异算子用于遗传编程，从而提高了交易策略DSL内的搜索效率和策略发现。
summary_zh:
遗传编程可以产生可解释的程序，但微小的语法变异可能引起巨大且不可预测的行为变化，降低局部性和采样效率。我们将其视为一个算子设计问题：学习一个连续的程序空间，其中隐变量距离具有行为意义，然后设计能够利用此结构而不改变进化优化器的变异算子。

我们通过跟踪受控隐变量扰动下的行为级差异来衡量局部性，从而确定行为局部连续变化的经验信任域。在使用具有四个语义成分（多头/空头进入和退出）的紧凑型交易策略 DSL 的情况下，我们学习了一个匹配的块因子分解嵌入，并将完整潜在空间上的各向同性高斯变异与几何编译的变异进行比较，后者将更新限制在语义配对的进入——退出子空间，并使用根据记录的变异结果训练的学习到的基于流的模型提出方向。

在相同的 $(μ+λ)$ 进化策略和五个资产的固定评估预算下，学习到的变异算子使用少一个数量级的评估次数就发现了强大的策略，并实现了最高的样本外夏普比率中位数。尽管各向同性变异偶尔能达到更高的峰值性能，但几何编译的变异产生了更快、更可靠的进展，表明语义对齐的变异可以在不修改底层进化算法的情况下显著提高搜索效率。

title: PhysDrape: Learning Explicit Forces and Collision Constraints for Physically Realistic Garment Draping
summary: Deep learning-based garment draping has emerged as a promising alternative to traditional Physics-Based Simulation (PBS), yet robust collision handling remains a critical bottleneck. Most existing methods enforce physical validity through soft penalties, creating an intrinsic trade-off between geometric feasibility and physical plausibility: penalizing collisions often distorts mesh structure, while preserving shape leads to interpenetration. To resolve this conflict, we present PhysDrape, a hybrid neural-physical solver for physically realistic garment draping driven by explicit forces and constraints. Unlike soft-constrained frameworks, PhysDrape integrates neural inference with explicit geometric solvers in a fully differentiable pipeline. Specifically, we propose a Physics-Informed Graph Neural Network conditioned on a physics-enriched graph -- encoding material parameters and body proximity -- to predict residual displacements. Crucially, we integrate a differentiable two-stage solver: first, a learnable Force Solver iteratively resolves unbalanced forces derived from the Saint Venant-Kirchhoff (StVK) model to ensure quasi-static equilibrium; second, a Differentiable Projection strictly enforces collision constraints against the body surface. This differentiable design guarantees physical validity through explicit constraints, while enabling end-to-end learning to optimize the network for physically consistent predictions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PhysDrape achieves state-of-the-art performance, ensuring negligible interpenetration with significantly lower strain energy compared to existing baselines, achieving superior physical fidelity and robustness in real-time.
tldr: This paper introduces PhysDrape, a hybrid neural-physical solver that combines a physics-informed GNN with a differentiable solver for physically realistic garment draping, addressing the collision handling bottleneck in deep learning-based methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍 PhysDrape，一种混合神经物理求解器，它结合了物理信息图神经网络与可区分的求解器，用于物理上真实的服装悬垂，解决了基于深度学习方法的碰撞处理瓶颈。
summary_zh: 基于深度学习的服装悬垂模拟已经成为一种替代传统基于物理模拟（PBS）的有希望的方案，然而，稳健的碰撞处理仍然是一个关键瓶颈。大多数现有方法通过软惩罚来强制执行物理有效性，从而在几何可行性和物理合理性之间产生内在的权衡：惩罚碰撞通常会扭曲网格结构，而保持形状会导致相互渗透。为了解决这个冲突，我们提出了PhysDrape，一种混合神经-物理求解器，用于实现由显式力和约束驱动的物理上真实的服装悬垂模拟。与软约束框架不同，PhysDrape将神经推理与显式几何求解器集成在一个完全可微的管道中。具体来说，我们提出了一个物理信息图神经网络，该网络以一个物理增强图为条件——编码材料参数和身体邻近度——来预测残余位移。至关重要的是，我们集成了一个可微的两阶段求解器：首先，一个可学习的力求解器迭代地解析源自Saint Venant-Kirchhoff (StVK)模型的未平衡力，以确保准静态平衡；其次，一个可微投影严格地强制执行针对身体表面的碰撞约束。这种可微设计通过显式约束保证了物理有效性，同时实现了端到端学习，从而优化网络以获得物理一致的预测。大量的实验表明，PhysDrape实现了最先进的性能，确保了可忽略的相互渗透，并且与现有基线相比，具有显著更低的应变能，从而在实时性方面实现了更高的物理保真度和鲁棒性。

title: Recovering 3D Shapes from Ultra-Fast Motion-Blurred Images
summary:
We consider the problem of 3D shape recovery from ultra-fast motion-blurred images. While 3D reconstruction from static images has been extensively studied, recovering geometry from extreme motion-blurred images remains challenging. Such scenarios frequently occur in both natural and industrial settings, such as fast-moving objects in sports (e.g., balls) or rotating machinery, where rapid motion distorts object appearance and makes traditional 3D reconstruction techniques like Multi-View Stereo (MVS) ineffective.
  In this paper, we propose a novel inverse rendering approach for shape recovery from ultra-fast motion-blurred images. While conventional rendering techniques typically synthesize blur by averaging across multiple frames, we identify a major computational bottleneck in the repeated computation of barycentric weights. To address this, we propose a fast barycentric coordinate solver, which significantly reduces computational overhead and achieves a speedup of up to 4.57x, enabling efficient and photorealistic simulation of high-speed motion. Crucially, our method is fully differentiable, allowing gradients to propagate from rendered images to the underlying 3D shape, thereby facilitating shape recovery through inverse rendering.
  We validate our approach on two representative motion types: rapid translation and rotation. Experimental results demonstrate that our method enables efficient and realistic modeling of ultra-fast moving objects in the forward simulation. Moreover, it successfully recovers 3D shapes from 2D imagery of objects undergoing extreme translational and rotational motion, advancing the boundaries of vision-based 3D reconstruction. Project page: https://maxmilite.github.io/rec-from-ultrafast-blur/
tldr: This paper presents a differentiable inverse rendering approach for recovering 3D shapes from ultra-fast motion-blurred images, using a fast barycentric coordinate solver to speed up the rendering process.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种可微分的逆渲染方法，用于从超快运动模糊图像中恢复 3D 形状，该方法使用快速重心坐标求解器来加速渲染过程。
summary_zh:
我们考虑从超快速运动模糊图像中恢复三维形状的问题。虽然从静态图像进行三维重建已得到广泛研究，但从极端运动模糊图像中恢复几何结构仍然具有挑战性。这种场景在自然和工业环境中经常发生，例如体育运动中的快速移动物体（如球）或旋转机械，其中快速运动会扭曲物体外观，并使诸如多视点立体（MVS）之类的传统三维重建技术失效。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的逆渲染方法，用于从超快速运动模糊图像中恢复形状。虽然传统的渲染技术通常通过对多个帧进行平均来合成模糊，但我们识别出重复计算重心坐标权重的一个主要计算瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种快速重心坐标求解器，它显著降低了计算开销，并实现了高达4.57倍的加速，从而能够高效且逼真地模拟高速运动。至关重要的是，我们的方法是完全可微分的，允许梯度从渲染图像传播到潜在的三维形状，从而促进通过逆渲染进行形状恢复。

我们在两种代表性运动类型上验证了我们的方法：快速平移和旋转。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够对前向模拟中超快速移动的物体进行高效且逼真的建模。此外，它成功地从经历极端平移和旋转运动的物体的二维图像中恢复三维形状，从而推进了基于视觉的三维重建的边界。项目页面：https://maxmilite.github.io/rec-from-ultrafast-blur/

title: All-Optical Segmentation via Diffractive Neural Networks for Autonomous Driving
summary: Semantic segmentation and lane detection are crucial tasks in autonomous driving systems. Conventional approaches predominantly rely on deep neural networks (DNNs), which incur high energy costs due to extensive analog-to-digital conversions and large-scale image computations required for low-latency, real-time responses. Diffractive optical neural networks (DONNs) have shown promising advantages over conventional DNNs on digital or optoelectronic computing platforms in energy efficiency. By performing all-optical image processing via light diffraction at the speed of light, DONNs save computation energy costs while reducing the overhead associated with analog-to-digital conversions by all-optical encoding and computing. In this work, we propose a novel all-optical computing framework for RGB image segmentation and lane detection in autonomous driving applications. Our experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the DONN system for image segmentation on the CityScapes dataset. Additionally, we conduct case studies on lane detection using a customized indoor track dataset and simulated driving scenarios in CARLA, where we further evaluate the model's generalizability under diverse environmental conditions.
tldr: This paper introduces an all-optical computing framework using Diffractive Optical Neural Networks (DONNs) for semantic segmentation and lane detection in autonomous driving, aiming to improve energy efficiency and reduce latency compared to traditional DNNs.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种使用衍射光学神经网络 (DONN) 的全光学计算框架，用于自动驾驶中的语义分割和车道检测，旨在提高能源效率并减少与传统 DNN 相比的延迟。
summary_zh: 语义分割和车道线检测是自动驾驶系统中至关重要的任务。传统方法主要依赖于深度神经网络(DNN)，由于低延时、实时响应需要大量的模数转换和大规模图像计算，导致高能耗。衍射光学神经网络(DONN)在能效方面展现出优于数字或光电计算平台上传统DNN的优势。通过以光速进行全光学图像处理，DONN利用全光学编码和计算节省了计算能源成本，同时减少了与模数转换相关的开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新型全光学计算框架，用于自动驾驶应用中的RGB图像分割和车道线检测。我们的实验结果证明了DONN系统在CityScapes数据集上进行图像分割的有效性。此外，我们使用定制的室内轨道数据集和CARLA中的模拟驾驶场景进行了车道线检测的案例研究，进一步评估了该模型在各种环境条件下的泛化能力。

title: Semantic-Deviation-Anchored Multi-Branch Fusion for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection and Localization in Unstructured Conveyor-Belt Coal Scenes
summary: Reliable foreign-object anomaly detection and pixel-level localization in conveyor-belt coal scenes are essential for safe and intelligent mining operations. This task is particularly challenging due to the highly unstructured environment: coal and gangue are randomly piled, backgrounds are complex and variable, and foreign objects often exhibit low contrast, deformation, occlusion, resulting in coupling with their surroundings. These characteristics weaken the stability and regularity assumptions that many anomaly detection methods rely on in structured industrial settings, leading to notable performance degradation. To support evaluation and comparison in this setting, we construct \textbf{CoalAD}, a benchmark for unsupervised foreign-object anomaly detection with pixel-level localization in coal-stream scenes. We further propose a complementary-cue collaborative perception framework that extracts and fuses complementary anomaly evidence from three perspectives: object-level semantic composition modeling, semantic-attribution-based global deviation analysis, and fine-grained texture matching. The fused outputs provide robust image-level anomaly scoring and accurate pixel-level localization. Experiments on CoalAD demonstrate that our method outperforms widely used baselines across the evaluated image-level and pixel-level metrics, and ablation studies validate the contribution of each component. The code is available at https://github.com/xjpp2016/USAD.
tldr: The paper introduces CoalAD, a benchmark dataset and a multi-branch fusion framework for unsupervised anomaly detection and localization in conveyor-belt coal scenes, achieving state-of-the-art performance. They address challenges like complex backgrounds, low contrast objects, and occlusion.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CoalAD数据集，以及一种用于传送带煤炭场景中无监督异常检测和定位的多分支融合框架，实现了最先进的性能。 其解决了复杂背景、低对比度物体和遮挡等挑战。
summary_zh: 传送带煤炭场景中可靠的异物异常检测和像素级定位对于安全和智能的采矿作业至关重要。这项任务特别具有挑战性，因为环境高度非结构化：煤炭和矸石随机堆积，背景复杂且多变，并且异物通常表现出低对比度、变形、遮挡，导致与周围环境耦合。这些特性削弱了许多异常检测方法在结构化工业环境中依赖的稳定性和规律性假设，导致性能显著下降。为了支持在此环境中的评估和比较，我们构建了\textbf{CoalAD}，这是一个用于煤流场景中无监督异物异常检测和像素级定位的基准。我们进一步提出了一种互补线索协同感知框架，该框架从三个角度提取和融合互补的异常证据：对象级语义组合建模、基于语义属性的全局偏差分析以及细粒度纹理匹配。融合的输出提供了稳健的图像级异常评分和精确的像素级定位。在CoalAD上的实验表明，我们的方法在评估的图像级和像素级指标上优于广泛使用的基线方法，并且消融研究验证了每个组件的贡献。代码可在https://github.com/xjpp2016/USAD上获得。

title: Regret Analysis of Unichain Average Reward Constrained MDPs with General Parameterization
summary: We study infinite-horizon average-reward constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs) under the unichain assumption and general policy parameterizations. Existing regret analyses for constrained reinforcement learning largely rely on ergodicity or strong mixing-time assumptions, which fail to hold in the presence of transient states. We propose a primal--dual natural actor--critic algorithm that leverages multi-level Monte Carlo (MLMC) estimators and an explicit burn-in mechanism to handle unichain dynamics without requiring mixing-time oracles. Our analysis establishes finite-time regret and cumulative constraint violation bounds that scale as $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$, up to approximation errors arising from policy and critic parameterization, thereby extending order-optimal guarantees to a significantly broader class of CMDPs.
tldr: This paper proposes a primal-dual natural actor-critic algorithm for average-reward constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs) under the unichain assumption, achieving $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret bounds without strong mixing assumptions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种原始-对偶自然actor-critic算法，用于单链假设下的平均奖励约束马尔可夫决策过程 (CMDP)，在没有强混合假设的情况下实现了 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ 的后悔界。
summary_zh: 我们研究在单链假设和一般策略参数化下的无限视界平均奖励约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDPs）。 现有约束强化学习的后悔分析在很大程度上依赖于遍历性或强混合时间假设，这些假设在存在瞬态状态时无法成立。 我们提出了一种原始-对偶自然Actor-Critic算法，该算法利用多层蒙特卡洛（MLMC）估计器和一个显式预热机制来处理单链动态，而无需混合时间预言机。 我们的分析建立了有限时间的后悔和累积约束违反界限，其规模为$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$，直至策略和评论家参数化产生的近似误差，从而将近似最优保证扩展到更广泛的CMDPs类别。

title: Multi-Agent Route Planning as a QUBO Problem
summary: Multi-Agent Route Planning considers selecting vehicles, each associated with a single predefined route, such that the spatial coverage of a road network is increased while redundant overlaps are limited. This paper gives a formal problem definition, proves NP-hardness by reduction from the Weighted Set Packing problem, and derives a Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization formulation whose coefficients directly encode unique coverage rewards and pairwise overlap penalties. A single penalty parameter controls the coverage-overlap trade-off. We distinguish between a soft regime, which supports multi-objective exploration, and a hard regime, in which the penalty is strong enough to effectively enforce near-disjoint routes. We describe a practical pipeline for generating city instances, constructing candidate routes, building the QUBO matrix, and solving it with an exact mixed-integer solver (Gurobi), simulated annealing, and D-Wave hybrid quantum annealing. Experiments on Barcelona instances with up to 10 000 vehicles reveal a clear coverage-overlap knee and show that Pareto-optimal solutions are mainly obtained under the hard-penalty regime, while D-Wave hybrid solvers and Gurobi achieve essentially identical objective values with only minor differences in runtime as problem size grows.
tldr: The paper formulates multi-agent route planning as a QUBO problem and solves it using classical and quantum-inspired solvers to optimize spatial coverage while limiting overlaps, finding the hard-penalty regime preferable for Pareto-optimal solutions.
tldr_zh: 该论文将多智能体路径规划问题形式化为二次无约束二元优化(QUBO)问题，并使用经典和量子启发式求解器解决该问题，以优化空间覆盖率并限制重叠，发现硬惩罚机制更适合帕累托最优解。
summary_zh: 多智能体路径规划考虑选择车辆，每个车辆与一条预定义的路线相关联，使得道路网络的空间覆盖范围增加，同时限制冗余重叠。本文给出了一个正式的问题定义，通过从加权集合 packing 问题进行归约证明了 NP 困难性，并推导出一个二次无约束二元优化公式，其系数直接编码独特覆盖奖励和成对重叠惩罚。一个单独的惩罚参数控制覆盖-重叠的权衡。我们区分了软模式，它支持多目标探索，以及硬模式，其中惩罚足够强以有效地强制执行近乎不相交的路线。我们描述了一条实用的流水线，用于生成城市实例、构建候选路线、构建 QUBO 矩阵，并使用精确的混合整数求解器 (Gurobi)、模拟退火和 D-Wave 混合量子退火求解它。在巴塞罗那实例上进行的最多 10000 辆车辆的实验揭示了一个清晰的覆盖-重叠拐点，并表明帕累托最优解主要在硬惩罚模式下获得，而 D-Wave 混合求解器和 Gurobi 在问题规模增长时实现了基本相同的目标值，只有运行时的微小差异。

title: ElliCE: Efficient and Provably Robust Algorithmic Recourse via the Rashomon Sets
summary: Machine learning models now influence decisions that directly affect people's lives, making it important to understand not only their predictions, but also how individuals could act to obtain better results. Algorithmic recourse provides actionable input modifications to achieve more favorable outcomes, typically relying on counterfactual explanations to suggest such changes. However, when the Rashomon set - the set of near-optimal models - is large, standard counterfactual explanations can become unreliable, as a recourse action valid for one model may fail under another. We introduce ElliCE, a novel framework for robust algorithmic recourse that optimizes counterfactuals over an ellipsoidal approximation of the Rashomon set. The resulting explanations are provably valid over this ellipsoid, with theoretical guarantees on uniqueness, stability, and alignment with key feature directions. Empirically, ElliCE generates counterfactuals that are not only more robust but also more flexible, adapting to user-specified feature constraints while being substantially faster than existing baselines. This provides a principled and practical solution for reliable recourse under model uncertainty, ensuring stable recommendations for users even as models evolve.
tldr: This paper introduces ElliCE, a method for generating robust algorithmic recourse by optimizing counterfactual explanations over an ellipsoidal approximation of the Rashomon set, providing provably valid, unique, and stable recourse actions even under model uncertainty.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍 ElliCE，一种通过在拉肖蒙集合的椭球近似上优化反事实解释来生成鲁棒算法补救的方法，即使在模型不确定性的情况下，也能提供可证明有效、独特且稳定的补救措施。
summary_zh: 机器学习模型现在直接影响人们生活的决策，因此不仅要了解其预测结果，还要了解个人如何采取行动以获得更好的结果，这一点至关重要。算法补救措施提供了可操作的输入修改，以实现更有利的结果，通常依赖于反事实解释来建议此类更改。然而，当拉肖蒙集（Rashomon set，即近乎最优模型的集合）很大时，标准的反事实解释可能会变得不可靠，因为对一个模型有效的补救措施可能在另一个模型下失败。我们引入了 ElliCE，一种新颖的稳健算法补救框架，该框架在拉肖蒙集的椭球近似上优化反事实。由此产生的解释在该椭球上具有可证明的有效性，具有关于唯一性、稳定性和与关键特征方向对齐的理论保证。在经验上，ElliCE 生成的反事实不仅更稳健，而且更灵活，能够适应用户指定的特征约束，同时比现有的基线方法快得多。这为模型不确定性下可靠的补救措施提供了一个有原则的和实用的解决方案，即使模型不断演进，也能确保为用户提供稳定的建议。
